item.title: 编译原理
item.description:
<h2 id="第一章-引论" class="heading-element"><span>第一章 引论</span>
 <a href="#%e7%ac%ac%e4%b8%80%e7%ab%a0-%e5%bc%95%e8%ae%ba" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200619122101408.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200619122101408.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200619122101408.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200619122101408.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200619122101408.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<h3 id="什么是编译程序" class="heading-element"><span>什么是编译程序</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%80%e4%b9%88%e6%98%af%e7%bc%96%e8%af%91%e7%a8%8b%e5%ba%8f" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>翻译程序(Translator)：把某一种语言程序(称为源语言程序)等价地转换成另一种语言程序(称为目标语言程序)的程序</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200224230231285.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200224230231285.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200224230231285.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200224230231285.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200224230231285.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>编译程序(Compiler)：把某一种高级语言程序等价地转换成另一种低级语言程序(如汇编语言或机器语言程序)的程序</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200224230240656.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200224230240656.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200224230240656.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200224230240656.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>* 运行编译程序的计算机：宿主机 * 运行目标程序的计算机：目标机 * 根据用途和侧重，编译程序可分为： 诊断编译程序(Diagnostic Compiler) 优化编译程序(Optimizing Compiler) 交叉编译程序(Cross Compiler)：编译程序产生不同于其宿主机的目标代码 可变目标编译程序(Retargetable Compiler：不需要重写编译程序中与机器无关的部分。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>解释程序(Interpreter)：</p>
<ul>
<li>把源语言写的源程序作为输入，但不产生目标程序，而是边解释边执行源程序</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228113729557.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228113729557.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228113729557.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228113729557.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228113729557.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<h3 id="为什么要学习编译原理" class="heading-element"><span>为什么要学习编译原理</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%ba%e4%bb%80%e4%b9%88%e8%a6%81%e5%ad%a6%e4%b9%a0%e7%bc%96%e8%af%91%e5%8e%9f%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>理解<mark>计算系统</mark>，注意不是计算机系统。</li>
<li>设计计算系统</li>
<li>计算思维 Computational Thinking)
<ul>
<li>计算思维是运用计算机科学的基础概念去求解问题、设计系统和理解人类的行为，它包括了一系列广泛的计算机科学的思维方法</li>
<li>计算思维和阅读、写作和算术一样，是21世纪每个人的基本技能，而不仅仅属于计算机科学家</li>
<li>包括
抽象
自动化
问题分解
递归
权衡
保护、冗余、容错、纠错和恢复
利用启发式推理来寻求解答
在不确定情况下的规划、学习和调度</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="编译过程" class="heading-element"><span>编译过程</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bc%96%e8%af%91%e8%bf%87%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>词法分析</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>输入源程序字符串，扫描哪些字符构成了标识符，哪些字符构成了常数</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>依循的原则：构词规则</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>描述工具：有限自动机</p>
</li>
<li>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">for i := 1 to 100 do
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">基本字 标识符 赋值号 整常数 基本字 整常数 基本字</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>语法分析</p>
<ul>
<li>在词法分析的基础上，根据语法规则把单词符号串分解成各类 <strong>语法单位(语法范畴)</strong>，如下图得到了一棵语法树。</li>
<li>依循的原则：语法规则</li>
<li>描述工具：上下文无关文法</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228151145773.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228151145773.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228151145773.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228151145773.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228151145773.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<ul>
<li>中间代码产生
<ul>
<li>对各类语法单位按语言的<strong>语义</strong>进行初步翻译</li>
<li>依循的原则：语义规则</li>
<li>描述工具：属性文法</li>
<li>中间代码：三元式、四元式，树，…</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228151540768.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228151540768.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228151540768.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228151540768.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228151540768.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<ul>
<li>优化
<ul>
<li>对前阶段产生的中间代码进行加工变换，以期在最后阶段产生更高效的目标代码</li>
<li>依循的原则：程序的等价变换原则</li>
<li>比如下图的憨憨程序就可以被编译器优化得很优秀</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228152021412.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228152021412.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228152021412.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228152021412.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228152021412.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<ul>
<li>目标代码产生
<ul>
<li>把中间代码变换成特定机器上的目标代码</li>
<li>依赖于硬件系统结构和机器指令的含义</li>
<li>目标代码三种形式
<ul>
<li>汇编指令代码: 需要进行汇编</li>
<li>绝对指令代码: 可直接运行</li>
<li>可重新定位指令代码: 需要链接</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="编译程序的结构" class="heading-element"><span>编译程序的结构</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bc%96%e8%af%91%e7%a8%8b%e5%ba%8f%e7%9a%84%e7%bb%93%e6%9e%84" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>编译程序总框</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228152816930.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228152816930.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228152816930.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228152816930.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228152816930.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>出错处理</p>
<ul>
<li>发现源程序中的错误，把有关错误信息报告给用户</li>
<li>语法错误
<ul>
<li>源程序中不符合语法（或词法）规则的错误</li>
<li>非法字符、括号不匹配、缺少；、…</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>语义错误
<ul>
<li>源程序中不符合语义规则的错误</li>
<li>说明错误、作用域错误、类型不一致、…</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>遍 (pass)</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>所谓的 “遍”，就是对源程序或源程序的中间表示从头到尾扫描一遍</p>
</li>
<li>
<blockquote><p>编译程序的五个阶段，当然可以实现为五“遍”，也就是每个阶段都接受上一阶段的输出，然后完成本阶段的变换，生成本阶段完整的输出，每个阶段的输出都是源程序的一个完整表示，如一个完整的单词序列、一个完整的语法分析树、一个完整的中间代码表示、甚至是目标代码表示 等等</p>
</blockquote></li>
<li>
<p><strong>阶段与遍是不同的概念</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>一遍可以由若干段组成</p>
<blockquote><p>在实际工作中，从程序效率和软件设计的角度考虑，我们往往会把若干联系非常紧密的阶段，<strong>合成一遍处理</strong>，比如说我们通常把词法分析、语法分析、中间代码生成这三个阶段合成一遍处理。</p>
<p>把词法分析和中间代码产生实现为一些子程序，也就是词法分析子程序或者是语义子程序，这两类子程序由语法分析模块来驱动或者调用。</p>
<p>在这个过程中，语法分析起主导作用，在语法分析的驱动下，词法分析 语法分析和中间代码生成三个阶段穿插进行，当词法分析完成最后一个单词的识别的时候，整个分析树也就很快得到了，同时所有的语法单位的翻译也就完成了，三个阶段合成一遍完成</p>
</blockquote></li>
<li>
<p>一个阶段也可以分若干遍来完成</p>
<blockquote><p>有些情况下一个阶段也可以分若干遍来实现，优化就是这样的例子，通常来说优化这个阶段被分成了很多遍，比如说 可以先对中间代码扫描一遍识别程序的基本结构，再扫描一遍完成简单的优化，再扫描一遍完成循环的优化，有时循环优化还有可能分成很多遍</p>
</blockquote></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>编译前端和后端</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228155322477.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228155322477.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228155322477.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228155322477.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>编译前端
<ul>
<li>与源语言有关，如词法分析，语法分析，语义分析与中间代码产生，与机器无关的优化</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>编译后端
<ul>
<li>与目标机有关，与目标机有关的优化，目标代码产生</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>带来的好处
<ul>
<li>程序逻辑结构清晰</li>
<li>优化更充分，有利于移植</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="编译程序的生成" class="heading-element"><span>编译程序的生成</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bc%96%e8%af%91%e7%a8%8b%e5%ba%8f%e7%9a%84%e7%94%9f%e6%88%90" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>工具：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>以汇编语言和机器语言为工具</p>
<ul>
<li>优点: 可以针对具体的机器，充分发挥计算机的系统功能；生成的程序效率高</li>
<li>缺点: 程序难读、难写、易出错、难维护、生产的效率低</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>以高级程序设计语言为工具</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>程序易读、易理解、容易维护、生产的效率高</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228175720075.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228175720075.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228175720075.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228175720075.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>上图表示已经有了 I 这种高级语言的实现和编译器，用 I 语言实现将 S 语言编译为 T 语言的编译器</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p>高级语言书写：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>利用有的某种语言的编译程序实现另一种语言的编译程序</p>
<p>下图表示利用 P1 编译器，将 L1 语言写的 P2 编译器，编译成 A 代码写的 P2 编译器</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180026836.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180026836.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180026836.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180026836.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180026836.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>移植方法：</p>
<ul>
<li>把一种机器上的编译程序移植到另一种机器上，跨机器</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180440787.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180440787.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180440787.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180440787.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180440787.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>自编译方式</p>
<ul>
<li>你通过低级语言实现 L 语言的一部分 L1，然后拿 L1 和低级语言去实现 L1+L2，然后拿 L1+L2 去实现 L1+L2+L3，依次类推。</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180803482.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180803482.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180803482.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180803482.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228180803482.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>编译程序自动产生：</p>
<ul>
<li>编译程序-编译程序，也叫编译程序产生器，也叫编译程序书写系统</li>
<li>LEX：词法分析程序产生器</li>
<li>YACC：语法分析程序产生器</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228181044912.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228181044912.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228181044912.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228181044912.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228181044912.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<h2 id="第二章-高级程序设计语言定义与语法描述" class="heading-element"><span>第二章 高级程序设计语言定义与语法描述</span>
 <a href="#%e7%ac%ac%e4%ba%8c%e7%ab%a0-%e9%ab%98%e7%ba%a7%e7%a8%8b%e5%ba%8f%e8%ae%be%e8%ae%a1%e8%af%ad%e8%a8%80%e5%ae%9a%e4%b9%89%e4%b8%8e%e8%af%ad%e6%b3%95%e6%8f%8f%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200620000615982.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200620000615982.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200620000615982.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200620000615982.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200620000615982.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<h3 id="程序设计语言的定义" class="heading-element"><span>程序设计语言的定义</span>
 <a href="#%e7%a8%8b%e5%ba%8f%e8%ae%be%e8%ae%a1%e8%af%ad%e8%a8%80%e7%9a%84%e5%ae%9a%e4%b9%89" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>语法：</p>
<ul>
<li>一组规则，用它可以形成和产生一个合式 (well-formed) 的程序</li>
<li>词法规则：<strong>单词符号</strong>的形成规则
<ul>
<li>单词符号是语言中具有独立意义的最基本结构</li>
<li>一般包括：常数、标识符、基本字、算符、界符等</li>
<li>描述工具：有限自动机</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>语法规则：<strong>语法单位</strong>的形成规则
<ul>
<li>语法单位通常包括：表达式、语句、分程序、过程、函数、程序等;</li>
<li>描述工具：上下文无关文法</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>例子：
<ul>
<li>E→iE→i：一个算术表达式可以由一个标识符构成；</li>
<li>E→E+EE→E+E：一个算术表达式可由两个算术表达式（也叫子表达式）通过 ‘+’ 号连接构成；</li>
<li>$E\rightarrow E*E$：一个算术表达式可由两个算术表达式通过 ‘*‘（星号，而不特指乘号）号连接构成；</li>
<li>E→(E)E→(E)：一个算术表达式外加括号，还是算术表达式；</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><strong>语法规则</strong>和<strong>词法规则</strong>定义了程序的形式结构</li>
<li>定义语法单位的意义属于<strong>语义</strong>问题</li>
</ul>
<p>语义：</p>
<ul>
<li>一组规则，用它可以定义一个程序的<strong>意义</strong></li>
<li>描述方法
<ul>
<li>自然语言描述
<ul>
<li>二义性、隐藏错误和不完整性</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>形式描述
<ul>
<li>操作语义</li>
<li>指称语义</li>
<li>代数语义</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p>程序，本质上是描述一定数据的处理过程；</p>
<p>程序语言的基本功能：描述数据和对数据的运算；</p>
<p>程序的层次结构：</p>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228184632420.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228184632420.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228184632420.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228184632420.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228184632420.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>静态绑定：发生在程序编译过程中间的绑定，包括变量声明、类型定义、函数定义</p>
<p>动态绑定：发生在程序运行过程中间的绑定，包括 C++ 中的多态性虚函数</p>
<p>表达式：</p>
<ul>
<li>表达式由运算量（也称操作数，即数据引用或函数调用）和算符（运算符，操作符）组成</li>
<li>形式：中缀、前缀、后缀</li>
</ul>
<p>赋值语句</p>
<ul>
<li>A := B</li>
<li>名字的<strong>左</strong>值：该名字代表的存储单元的<strong>地址</strong></li>
<li>名字的<strong>右</strong>值：该名字代表的<strong>存贮单元的内容</strong></li>
<li>C 语言中，<code>a+5</code> 只有右值没有左值，因为该值只能用在赋值号右边</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="程序设计语言的描述" class="heading-element"><span>程序设计语言的描述</span>
 <a href="#%e7%a8%8b%e5%ba%8f%e8%ae%be%e8%ae%a1%e8%af%ad%e8%a8%80%e7%9a%84%e6%8f%8f%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="上下文无关文法" class="heading-element"><span>上下文无关文法</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%8a%e4%b8%8b%e6%96%87%e6%97%a0%e5%85%b3%e6%96%87%e6%b3%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>文法：</p>
<ul>
<li>描述语言的语法结构的形成规则</li>
<li>如 <code>He gave me a book.</code> 这句自然语言的文法规则为：</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228203556553.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228203556553.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228203556553.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228203556553.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228203556553.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228203605324.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228203605324.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228203605324.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228203605324.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200228203605324.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>相关概念：</p>
<ul>
<li>字母表：一个有穷字符集，记为 ∑∑</li>
<li>字母表中每个元素称为字符</li>
<li>∑∑ 上的字（也叫字符串）是指由 ∑∑ 中的字符所构成的一个有穷序列</li>
<li>不包含任何字符的序列称为空字，记为 εε</li>
<li>用 ∑※∑※ 表示 ∑∑ 上的所有字的全体，包含空字 εε
<ul>
<li>例如：设 ∑=a,b∑=a,b，则 ∑※=ε,a,b,aa,ab,ba,bb,aaa,⋯∑※=ε,a,b,aa,ab,ba,bb,aaa,⋯</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>∑※∑※ 的子集 UU 和 VV 的连接（积）定义为 UV=αβ | α∈U\andβ∈VUV=αβ | α∈U\andβ∈V
<ul>
<li>例如：设 U=a,aa,V=b,bbU=a,aa,V=b,bb，则 UV=ab,abb,aab,aabbUV=ab,abb,aab,aabb，并且此时 UV≠VUUV≠VU</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>VV 自身的 nn 次积记为 Vn=V⋯Vn个Vn=V⋯V⏟n个</li>
<li>V0=εV0=ε</li>
<li>V※V※ 是 VV 的闭包：V※=V0∪V1∪V2∪V3∪⋯V※=V0∪V1∪V2∪V3∪⋯</li>
<li>V+V+ 是 VV 的正规闭包： V+=VV※V+=VV※
<ul>
<li>正规闭包与闭包的区别：如果 V 中原来没有空字，那么闭包有空字，正规闭包没空字</li>
<li>例如：设 U=a,aaU=a,aa，那么 U※=ε,a,aa,aaa,aaaa,⋯,U+=a,aa,aaa,aaaa,⋯U※=ε,a,aa,aaa,aaaa,⋯,U+=a,aa,aaa,aaaa,⋯</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p>上下文无关文法：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>上下文无关文法 GG 是一个四元组 G=(VT,VN,S,P)G=(VT,VN,S,P)，其中</p>
<ul>
<li></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<pre><code>VTVT

：

终结符

 

(Terminal) 集合 (非空)

- 不能再分解的
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li></li>
</ul>
<pre><code>VNVN

：

非终结符

 

(Noterminal) 集合(非空)，且



VT∩VN=∅VT∩VN=∅

- 能再分解，比如上图中的 “主语”、”谓语”
- 非终结符可由终结符和非终结符构成
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li></li>
</ul>
<pre><code>SS

：文法的

开始符号

，



S∈VNS∈VN

- 是一个特殊的非终结符，它代表所定义的语言最终感兴趣的语法单位
- 比如英语中的 “句子”，编程中的 “程序”
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li></li>
</ul>
<pre><code>PP

：

产生式

集合(有限)，每个产生式形式为

- P→α，P∈VN，α∈(VT∪VN)※P→α，P∈VN，α∈(VT∪VN)※
- 上式读成 “P 定义为 α”，即左边的终结符 P，是被定义的句法单位，右边的 α 是构成这个句法单位的一种组合。
- (VT∪VN)(VT∪VN) 代表终结符和非终结符组成的字符集合，再打上 * 做闭包，代表该集合中的符号组成的字的全体
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>
<p>开始符 SS 至少必须在某个产生式的左部出现一次</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>例如，定义只含 +, * 的算术表达式的文法：G=&lt;</p>
<p>{i, +, *, (, )}</p>
<p>,</p>
<p>{E}</p>
<p>,</p>
<p>E</p>
<p>, P &gt;，其中，P 由下列产生式组成：</p>
<ul>
<li>E→iE→i</li>
<li>E→E+EE→E+E</li>
<li>E→E∗EE→E∗E</li>
<li>E→(E)E→(E)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>巴科斯范式：”-&gt;” 用 “::=” 来表示</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>上下文无关文法</p>
<ul>
<li>约定 {P→α1 P→α2cdots P→αn缩写为→P→α1|α2|⋯|αn{P→α1 P→α2cdots P→αn→缩写为P→α1|α2|⋯|αn</li>
<li>其中 “|” 读成 “或”，称 α1α1 为 PP 的一个候选式</li>
<li>表示一个文法时，通常只给出开始符号和产生式</li>
<li>例如，定义只含 +, * 的算术表达式的文法可以缩写为：
G(E):E→i | E+E | E∗E | (E)G(E):E→i | E+E | E∗E | (E)</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="文法与语言" class="heading-element"><span>文法与语言</span>
 <a href="#%e6%96%87%e6%b3%95%e4%b8%8e%e8%af%ad%e8%a8%80" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>推导：</p>
<ul>
<li>定义：称 αAβαAβ 直接推出 αγβαγβ，即 αAβ⇒αγβαAβ⇒αγβ ，仅当 A→γA→γ 是一个产生式，且 α,β∈(VT∪Vn)※α,β∈(VT∪Vn)※</li>
<li>如果α1⇒α2⇒…⇒αnα1⇒α2⇒…⇒αn，则我们称这个序列是从 α1α1 到 αnαn 的一个推导。若存在一个从 α1α1 到αnαn 的推导，则称 α1α1 可以推导出 αnαn 。</li>
<li>对文法 G(E):E→i | E+E | E∗E | (E)G(E):E→i | E+E | E∗E | (E)，则 E⇒(E)⇒(E+E)⇒(i+E)⇒(i+i)E⇒(E)⇒(E+E)⇒(i+E)⇒(i+i)</li>
<li>称 α1∗⇒αnα1⇒∗αn 从 α1α1 经过 0 步或若干步推出 αnαn</li>
<li>称 α1+⇒αnα1⇒+αn 从 α1α1 经过 1 步或若干步推出 αnαn</li>
<li>α1∗⇒αnα1⇒∗αn 即 α=βα=β 或 α1+⇒αnα1⇒+αn</li>
</ul>
<p>句型：</p>
<ul>
<li>假定 G 是一个文法， S 是它的开始符号，如果 S∗⇒αnS⇒∗αn，则称 αα 是一个句型</li>
<li>S∗⇒SS⇒∗S，所以 S 也是句型</li>
</ul>
<p>句子：</p>
<ul>
<li>仅含终结符号的句型是一个句子。</li>
</ul>
<p>语言：</p>
<ul>
<li>文法 G 所产生的句子的全体是一个语言，记为 L(G)L(G)
L(G)=α | S+⇒α,α∈V※TL(G)=α | S⇒+α,α∈VT※，即 L(G)L(G) 是由 αα 构成的集合， αα 属于终结符的闭包，且能由 S 推导得来。</li>
<li><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104118219.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104118219.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104118219.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104118219.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104118219.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></li>
<li><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104345152.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104345152.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104345152.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104345152.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104345152.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></li>
<li><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104632829.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104632829.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104632829.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104632829.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104632829.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></li>
<li><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104915177.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104915177.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104915177.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104915177.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229104915177.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></li>
<li><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229105135900.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229105135900.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229105135900.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229105135900.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229105135900.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></li>
</ul>
<h4 id="语法树与二义性" class="heading-element"><span>语法树与二义性</span>
 <a href="#%e8%af%ad%e6%b3%95%e6%a0%91%e4%b8%8e%e4%ba%8c%e4%b9%89%e6%80%a7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>最左推导和最右推导：</p>
<ul>
<li>从一个句型到另一个句型的推导往往不唯一
E+E⇒i+E⇒i+i E+E⇒E+i⇒i+iE+E⇒i+E⇒i+i E+E⇒E+i⇒i+i</li>
<li>最左推导：任何一步 α⇒βα⇒β 都是对 αα 中的最左非终结符进行替换</li>
<li>最右推导：任何一步 α⇒βα⇒β 都是对 αα 中的最右非终结符进行替换</li>
</ul>
<p>语法树：</p>
<ul>
<li>用一张图表示一个句型的推导，称为语法树</li>
<li>一棵语法树是不同推导过程的共性抽象</li>
<li>最左推导所对应的语法树的生长顺序是从上往下、从左往右</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229110330503.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229110330503.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229110330503.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229110330503.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229110330503.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>二义性 ambiguity：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>文法的二义性：如果一个文法存在某个句子对应两棵不同的语法树，则说这个文法是二义的
G(E)： E → i|E+E|E*E|(E) 是二义文法，对于 i∗i+ii∗i+i 可以画出两棵语法树</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229111904441.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229111904441.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229111904441.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229111904441.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>语言的二义性：一个语言是二义的，如果对它不存在无二义的文法</p>
<ul>
<li>对于语言 L，可能存在 G 和 G’，使得 L(G)=L(G’)=L，有可能其中一个文法为二义的，
另一个为无二义的</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>自然语言的二义性举例 <code>John saw Mary in a boat</code></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229112549846.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229112549846.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229112549846.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229112549846.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229112549846.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<ul>
<li>二义问题是不可判定问题，即不存在一个算法，它能在有限步骤内，确切地判定一个文法是否是二义的</li>
<li>可以找到一组无二义文法的充分条件</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="形式语言鸟瞰" class="heading-element"><span>形式语言鸟瞰</span>
 <a href="#%e5%bd%a2%e5%bc%8f%e8%af%ad%e8%a8%80%e9%b8%9f%e7%9e%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>乔姆斯基于1956年建立形式语言体系，他把文法分成四种类型：0，1，2，3型</li>
<li>与上下文无关文法一样，它们都由四部分组成，
但对产生式的限制有所不同</li>
</ul>
<p>0 型（短语文法，图灵机）：</p>
<ul>
<li>产生式形如：α→βα→β</li>
<li>其中：α∈(VT∪VN)※α∈(VT∪VN)※ 且至少含有一个非终结符；β∈(VT∪VN)※β∈(VT∪VN)※</li>
<li>乔姆斯基文法体系中，最通用，也是描述能力最强、最一般的文法，产生式的约束最弱</li>
</ul>
<p>1 型（上下文有关文法，线性界限自动机）:</p>
<ul>
<li>产生式形如：α→βα→β</li>
<li>其中：|α|≤|β||α|≤|β|，仅 S→εS→ε 例外</li>
<li>上下文有关文法非常复杂，等下会提到</li>
</ul>
<p>2 型(上下文无关文法，非确定下推自动机)：</p>
<ul>
<li>产生式形如： A→βA→β</li>
<li>其中：A∈VNA∈VN；β∈(VT∪VN)※β∈(VT∪VN)※</li>
</ul>
<p>3 型 (正规文法，有限自动机)</p>
<ul>
<li>产生式形如： A→αBA→αB 或 A→αA→α，终结符要么没有要么出现在右式最右边（右线性文法</li>
<li>其中： α∈V※Tα∈VT※；A，B∈V※NA，B∈VN※</li>
<li>产生式形如： A→BαA→Bα 或 A→αA→α （左线性文法</li>
<li>其中： α∈V※Tα∈VT※；A，B∈VNA，B∈VN</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229154446865.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229154446865.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229154446865.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229154446865.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229154446865.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<p>四种类型文法的描述能力：</p>
<ul>
<li>L5=anbn | n≥1L5=anbn | n≥1 不能由正规文法产生，但可由上下文无关文法产生
G5(S):S→aSb | abG5(S):S→aSb | ab</li>
<li>L6=anbncn|n≥1L6=anbncn|n≥1不能由上下文无关文法产生，但可由上下文有关文法产生</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229155016138.png"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer"><img loading="lazy" src="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229155016138.png" alt="img" srcset="https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229155016138.png?size=small, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229155016138.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://zhangt.top/CS/Compilation-Principles-Study-Notes/image-20200229155016138.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></a></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>程序设计语言不是上下文无关语言，甚至不是上下文有关语言</p>
</li>
<li></li>
</ul>
<p>L7=αcα|α∈a,b※L7=αcα|α∈a,b※</p>
<p>不能由上下文无关文法产生，甚至连上下文有关文法也不能产生，只能由0型文法产生</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>标识符引用。比如编程语言中要求使用的变量必须前面声明过</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>过程调用过程中，“形-实参数的对应性”(如个数，顺序和类型一致性)</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>对于现今程序设计语言，在编译程序中，仍然采用上下文无关文法来描述其语言结构 （上下文无关文法的成熟高效）</p>
</li>
</ul>

item.title: Database Systems
item.description:
<p><strong>CS186笔记</strong></p>
<h1 id="concept-maps" class="heading-element"><span>Concept Maps</span>
 <a href="#concept-maps" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><h2 id="database-implementation" class="heading-element"><span>Database Implementation</span>
 <a href="#database-implementation" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><img loading="lazy" src="https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-implementation.png" alt="implementation" srcset="https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-implementation.png?size=small, https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-implementation.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-implementation.png?size=large 2x" data-title="implementation" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="database-design" class="heading-element"><span>Database Design</span>
 <a href="#database-design" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><img loading="lazy" src="https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-design.png" alt="design" srcset="https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-design.png?size=small, https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-design.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-design.png?size=large 2x" data-title="design" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="acid" class="heading-element"><span>ACID</span>
 <a href="#acid" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><img loading="lazy" src="https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-acid.png" alt="acid" srcset="https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-acid.png?size=small, https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-acid.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://notes.bencuan.me/cs186/concept-acid.png?size=large 2x" data-title="acid" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h1 id="what-is-an-io-and-why-should-i-care" class="heading-element"><span>What is an I/O and why should I care?</span>
 <a href="#what-is-an-io-and-why-should-i-care" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><p>If you’re taking 186, you’ve probably heard or experienced some variation of the following:</p>
<ul>
<li>This class has a lot of I/O counting on exams</li>
<li>I/Os are weird, sometimes you can read like 5 things at the same time but it’s still one I/O for some reason</li>
<li>I/O counting is tedious and boring and I will never do it after this class, so why do I need to do it??????</li>
</ul>
<p>While I can’t guarantee that you’ll ever count I/Os after this class, my hope for this article is to justify why it’s necessary for understanding key database design concepts, and how the principles can be applied to real-world issues in query optimization. It’s like learning how to multiply numbers by hand when we have calculators: although functionally obsolete, we still need to understand the mechanics before we can start taking the shortcut.</p>
<h2 id="the-problem-the-problem" class="heading-element"><span>The Problem <a href="#the-problem">#</a></span>
 <a href="#the-problem-the-problem" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>The biggest issue that most database solutions solve is that <strong>disks are slow and memory is fast, but we don’t have enough memory to store everything we need.</strong></p>
<p>Think about trying to process hundreds of gigabytes of data on your computer (very common for applications like machine learning), even though you only have something like 16GB of RAM.</p>
<p>If we want our operations to complete in a reasonable amount of time, we’ll want to do as much as possible within RAM. Most of the algorithms you’ve likely encountered in 61B assume that we have an <em>infinite</em> amount of fast memory, and that all operations took the same amount of time, since we only cared about asymptotic runtimes.</p>
<p>However, in the real world, reading something from memory could be hundreds of thousands of times faster than reading something from disk. As such, when evaluating the runtime of an algorithm we only care about how long it takes to transfer something from disk into memory so that we can access it. This basic unit of time is what we call the Input-Output cost, or “an I/O” for short.</p>
<h2 id="definition-of-an-io-definition-of-an-io" class="heading-element"><span>Definition of an I/O <a href="#definition-of-an-io">#</a></span>
 <a href="#definition-of-an-io-definition-of-an-io" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote><p>Summary</p>
<p><strong>An I/O is a single read or write event where one page of data is transferred between memory and disk.</strong></p>
</blockquote><p>A <strong>page</strong> is the basic (“atomic”) unit of information on disk: since it’s more efficient than reading one byte at a time, nearly all modern hard drives and SSDs have some hard-coded block size in their firmware, such that any data accessed from them will always be delivered one block at a time. These blocks are then converted into pages, which also have a fixed size, in the operating system.</p>
<p>For the purposes of this class, <strong>“block” and “page” can be used interchangably.</strong> In most contexts we will refer to it as a page. However, in general, <a href="https://stackoverflow.com/questions/22137555/whats-the-difference-between-page-and-block-in-operating-system"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">there is a difference.</a></p>
<p>A very important thing to note down is that <strong>there is no such thing as a fractional I/O.</strong> If we need to read 4.1 pages’ worth of data, it will really take 5 I/Os since the last page needs to be read in its entirety.</p>
<h2 id="applications-applications" class="heading-element"><span>Applications <a href="#applications">#</a></span>
 <a href="#applications-applications" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>The primary application for evaluating I/O cost is for <a href="">query optimization</a></p>
<h3 id="query-optimization" class="heading-element"><span>Query Optimization</span>
 <a href="#query-optimization" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p><strong>Introduction</strong> Query optimization is the bridge between a declarative language (like SQL, where you describe “what” you want) and an imperative&hellip;</p>
<p>2023/11/20</p>
<p>, where we need to decide which operation is the most efficient out of several possibilities.</p>
<p><strong>Why can’t we just use asymptotic runtime?</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>We’re dealing with known, finite input sizes: We may decide to use a different algorithm for a 1000-row table versus a 10000000-row table, even if the algorithm for the former has poorer asymptotic properties.</li>
<li>The difference between a O(n)O(n)O(n) algorithm and an O(2n)O(2n)O(2n) algorithm can get extremely noticable when we have millions (or billions) of rows in a table.</li>
<li>The runtime depends on the data that we put in. For instance, certain types of joins (like Sort-Merge Join) perform poorly when we have large amounts of duplicate data. Since we already know (or can approximate) what data we have, we can use this knowledge to estimate how much of the data will need to be accessed to complete the operation, which may be dramatically better or worse than its average runtime.</li>
</ul>
<h1 id="sql-part-1---basic-queries" class="heading-element"><span>SQL Part 1 - Basic Queries</span>
 <a href="#sql-part-1---basic-queries" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><h2 id="database-lingo" class="heading-element"><span>Database Lingo</span>
 <a href="#database-lingo" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>Relational databases are made up of <strong>tables</strong> (aka relations). A table has a name (we’ll call this one <code>Person</code>) and looks like this:</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">name</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">age</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">num_dogs</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ace</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">20</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">4</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ada</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">18</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ben</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">7</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">2</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Cho</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">27</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>Tables have rows (aka tuples) and columns (aka attributes). In this example, the columns are <code>name</code>, <code>age</code>, <code>num_dogs</code>.</p>
<h2 id="querying-a-table" class="heading-element"><span>Querying a Table</span>
 <a href="#querying-a-table" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>The most fundamental SQL query looks like this:</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">SELECT &lt;columns&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">FROM &lt;tb1&gt;;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>The <code>FROM</code> clause tells SQL which table you’re interested in, and the <code>SELECT</code> clause tells SQL which columns of that table you want to see. For example, consider a table Person(<code>name</code>, <code>age</code>, <code>num_dogs</code>) containing the data below:</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">name</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">age</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">num_dogs</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ace</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">20</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">4</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ada</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">18</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ben</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">7</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">2</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Cho</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">27</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>If we executed this SQL query:</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">SELECT name , num_dogs
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">FROM Person ;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>then we could get the following output.</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">name</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">num_dogs</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ace</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">4</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ada</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ben</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">2</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Cho</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>Optionally, we can also add a <code>DISTINCT</code> keyword to the <code>SELECT</code> statement which removes duplicate rows before output. If we execute the following query to the previous example, the output does not change because all rows are already unique:</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">SELECT DISTINCT name , num_dogs
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">FROM Person ;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">name</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">num_dogs</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ace</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">4</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ada</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ben</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">2</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Cho</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>In SQL, however, the order of the rows is nondeterministic unless the query contains an <code>ORDER BY</code> (we’ll get to this later). So the following output is equally valid:</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">name</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">age</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">num_dogs</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ben</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">7</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">2</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Cho</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">27</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ace</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">20</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">4</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ada</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">18</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>In fact, any ordering of those 4 rows is correct – so unless your query contains an <code>ORDER BY</code> clause, don’t make any assumptions about the order of your results.</p>
<h2 id="filtering-out-uninteresting-rows" class="heading-element"><span>Filtering out uninteresting rows</span>
 <a href="#filtering-out-uninteresting-rows" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>Frequently we are interested in only a subset of the data available to us. That is, even though we might have data about many people or things, we often only want to see the data that we have about very specific people or things. This is where the <code>WHERE</code> clause comes in handy; it lets us specify which specific rows of our table we’re interested in. Here’s the syntax:</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">SELECT &lt;columns&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">FROM &lt;tbl&gt;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">WHERE &lt;predicate&gt; ;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>Once again, let’s consider our table Person(<code>name</code>, <code>age</code>, <code>num_dogs</code>). Suppose we want to see how many dogs each person owns — same as before — but this time we only care about the dog-owners who are adults. Let’s walk through this SQL query:</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">SELECT name, num_dogs
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">FROM Person
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">WHERE age &gt;= 18 ;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>When reasoning about query execution you can use the following rule: each clause in a SQL query happens in the order it’s written, except for <code>SELECT</code> which happens last. This is not necessarily the order the database actually does these operations (more on this later in the semester), but it is easy to think about and will always give us the correct answer. The <code>FROM</code> clause tells us we’re interested in the Person table, so this is the table we start with:</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">name</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">age</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">num_dogs</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ace</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">20</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">4</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ada</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">18</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ben</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">7</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">2</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Cho</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">27</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>Next we move on to the <code>WHERE</code> clause. It tells us that we only want to keep the rows satisfying the predicate age &gt;= 18, so we remove the row with Ben, and are left with the following table:</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">name</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">age</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">num_dogs</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ace</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">20</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">4</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ada</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">18</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Cho</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">27</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<p>And finally, we <code>SELECT</code> the columns <code>name</code> and <code>num_dogs</code> to obtain our final result. (Again, any permutation of this result is equally valid so you shouldn’t make any assumptions about the order of the rows.) This gives us our final table:</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">name</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">num_dogs</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ace</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">4</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Ada</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">Cho</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">3</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="boolean-operators" class="heading-element"><span>Boolean operators</span>
 <a href="#boolean-operators" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>If you want to filter on more complicated predicates, you can use the boolean operators <code>NOT</code>, <code>AND</code>, and <code>OR</code>. For instance, if we only cared about dog-owners who are not only adults, but also own more than 3 dogs, then we would write the following query:</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">SELECT name, num_dogs
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">FROM Person
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">WHERE age &gt;= 18
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">AND num_dogs &gt; 3;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>As in Python, this is the order of evaluation for boolean operators:</p>
<ol>
<li><code>NOT</code></li>
<li><code>AND</code></li>
<li><code>OR</code></li>
</ol>
<p>That said, it is good practice to avoid ambiguity by adding parentheses even when they are not strictly necessary.</p>
<h2 id="filtering-null-values" class="heading-element"><span>Filtering Null Values</span>
 <a href="#filtering-null-values" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>In SQL, there is a special value called NULL, which can be used as a value for any data type, and represents an “unknown” or “missing” value.</p>
<p>Bear in mind that some values in your database may be <code>NULL</code> whether you like it or not, so it’s good to know how SQL handles them. It pretty much boils down to the following rules:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>If you do anything with <code>NULL</code>, you’ll just get <code>NULL</code>. For instance if x is <code>NULL</code>, then x &gt; 3, 1 = x, and x + 4 all evaluate to <code>NULL</code>. Even x = <code>NULL</code> would evaluate to <code>NULL</code>; if you want to check whether x is <code>NULL</code>, then write x IS <code>NULL</code> or x IS NOT <code>NULL</code> instead.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>NULL</code> is falsey, meaning that <code>WHERE NULL</code> is just like <code>WHERE FALSE</code>. The row in question does not get included.</p>
</li>
<li>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-plaintext" data-lang="plaintext"><span class="line"><span class="cl">NULL</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>short-circuits with boolean operators. That means a boolean expression involving</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-plaintext" data-lang="plaintext"><span class="line"><span class="cl">NULL</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>will evaluate to:</p>
<ul>
