 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>导引型媒体（guided media）：信号在固体媒体中传输，比如光缆、双绞铜线和同轴电缆。</li>
<li>非导引型媒体（unguided media）：电波在空气中传播，比如无线局域网或数字卫星频道。</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="网络核心network-core" class="heading-element"><span>网络核心（Network Core）</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c%e6%a0%b8%e5%bf%83network-core" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>网络核心：由端系统的分组交换机和链路构成的网状网络。下图标亮部分即使网络核心。</p>
<p>一共有三种交换方式：报文交换（很少使用）、分组交换和电路交换</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/dAzBna3i9lZU2uN.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/dAzBna3i9lZU2uN.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/dAzBna3i9lZU2uN.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/dAzBna3i9lZU2uN.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="分组交换packet-switching" class="heading-element"><span>分组交换（Packet Switching）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%88%86%e7%bb%84%e4%ba%a4%e6%8d%a2packet-switching" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>端系统之间彼此传输报文，分组交换中，将长报文划分为分组，分组再通过通信链路和分组交换机（分为路由器和链路层交换机）传送。</p>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>存储转发传输</strong>（Store-and-Forward Transmission）</p>
<p>分组交换和报文交换都采用了存储转发的传输形式。但分组交换的存储转发以分组为单位，即交换机接收到整个分组后才能输出该分组的数据；而报文交换的存储转发单位为报文，需要交换机接收到整个报文后才能输出。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/YZt3aBmjsS1dLIi.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/YZt3aBmjsS1dLIi.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/YZt3aBmjsS1dLIi.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/YZt3aBmjsS1dLIi.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>传输相同大小的数据包，分组交换比报文交换更快。下面是分组交换传输3L大小的报文的时间流，报文分为3个大小为L的分组，根据分组交换原理，一共耗费了 4L/R 时间完成传输（即<strong>存储转发时延</strong>）。而如果使用报文传输同样的3L大小的报文则需要耗费 6L/R 时间。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/zkxt9eo4fQqmLRV.jpg" alt="分组交换.jpg" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/zkxt9eo4fQqmLRV.jpg?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/zkxt9eo4fQqmLRV.jpg?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/zkxt9eo4fQqmLRV.jpg?size=large 2x" data-title="分组交换.jpg" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>排队时延</strong>（Queuing Delay）和<strong>分组丢失</strong>（Packet Loss）</p>
<p>分组交换机有有一个<strong>输出缓存</strong>（output buffer），分组可能会在分组交换机上排队等待输出，造成排队时延。</p>
<p>分组交换机的缓存空间是有限的，所以在过于拥堵时会产生分组丢失（丢包）。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/iCtTZGq6BQuHzwa.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/iCtTZGq6BQuHzwa.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/iCtTZGq6BQuHzwa.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/iCtTZGq6BQuHzwa.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>转发表</strong>（Forwarding Table）和<strong>路由选择协议</strong>（Routing Protocol）</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>路由</strong>：分组中包括IP地址；</li>
<li><strong>转发</strong>：路由器中将目的地址映射为输出链路。</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="电路交换circuit-switching" class="heading-element"><span>电路交换（Circuit Switching）</span>
 <a href="#%e7%94%b5%e8%b7%af%e4%ba%a4%e6%8d%a2circuit-switching" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p><strong>端到端连接</strong>（end- to-end connection）：在发送数据之前，必须先在发送和接收两端建立端到端连接，并预留一部分带宽。而分组交换不预留，所以会造成排队和丢包。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/D91fBHdvxo24MFT.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/D91fBHdvxo24MFT.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/D91fBHdvxo24MFT.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/D91fBHdvxo24MFT.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="频分多路复用fdm" class="heading-element"><span>频分多路复用（FDM）</span>
 <a href="#%e9%a2%91%e5%88%86%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8fdm" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>链路中的每条连接专用一个频段。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/NubPYJA6WrcvsqI.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/NubPYJA6WrcvsqI.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/NubPYJA6WrcvsqI.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/20/NubPYJA6WrcvsqI.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="时分多路复用tdm" class="heading-element"><span>时分多路复用（TDM）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%97%b6%e5%88%86%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8tdm" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>远距离传输会有衰减，所以考虑用<strong>数字信号</strong>进行传输。在时域上对信号进行<strong>采样</strong>，接收时再将采样信号恢复。</p>
<p>TDM在时域上被划分为固定的<strong>帧</strong>（frame），每帧又被划分为固定数量的<strong>时隙</strong>（slot），链路中的每条连接专用一个时隙。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/21/yLN9bmafTdIqj6c.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/21/yLN9bmafTdIqj6c.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/21/yLN9bmafTdIqj6c.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/21/yLN9bmafTdIqj6c.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="分组交换--电路交换" class="heading-element"><span>分组交换 &amp; 电路交换</span>
 <a href="#%e5%88%86%e7%bb%84%e4%ba%a4%e6%8d%a2--%e7%94%b5%e8%b7%af%e4%ba%a4%e6%8d%a2" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>分组交换的性能优于电路交换，适用于随机数据，可以满足更多用户。</p>
<p>电路交换需要预留带宽，相当于固定了链路用户的数量。而分组交换不需要预留带宽，用户使用网络是有一定概率的，在一个时刻较多人使用的概率其实相对较低，所以一条链路可以给更多的用户使用。</p>
<p>电路交换适用于特殊情况，比如要保障传输数据能力。</p>
<h3 id="网络结构" class="heading-element"><span>网络结构</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c%e7%bb%93%e6%9e%84" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>网络结构是网中之网，具有层次结构。</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>ISP</strong>：ISP分为许多层级，比如<strong>第一层ISP</strong>（tier-1 ISP）、<strong>区域ISP</strong>（regional ISP）、<strong>接入ISP</strong>（access ISP）。端系统通过接入ISP与因特网相连，全球的ISP通过各个层级相连，形成了互联网的互联。</li>
<li>因特网交换点（Internet Exchange Point，<strong>IXP</strong>）：由第三方公司创建，IXP是一个汇合点，多个ISP在此处对等。</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/21/NugS6r92GDaCqeJ.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/21/NugS6r92GDaCqeJ.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/21/NugS6r92GDaCqeJ.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/21/NugS6r92GDaCqeJ.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="协议protocol" class="heading-element"><span>协议（Protocol）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%aeprotocol" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>协议定义了在两个或多个通信实体之间交换的报文格式和次序，以及报文发送和/或接收一条报文或其他时间所采取的动作。</p>
<p>协议三大要素：</p>
<ul>
<li>语法（Syntax）：每一段内容符合一定规则的格式，比如一个报文前8位是原地址，后八个是目的地址（只是举例，不要当真）之类。</li>
<li>语义（Semantics）：每一段内容需要代表某种意义，比如原地址部分的二进制到底是指哪个地址。</li>
<li>同步（Timing）：通信的过程，即每一段任务的执行顺序。</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/RS7Lpk2YjGtCnKV.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/RS7Lpk2YjGtCnKV.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/RS7Lpk2YjGtCnKV.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/RS7Lpk2YjGtCnKV.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="协议层次protocol-layer及其服务模型" class="heading-element"><span>协议层次（Protocol Layer）及其服务模型</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%ae%e5%b1%82%e6%ac%a1protocol-layer%e5%8f%8a%e5%85%b6%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="五层因特网协议栈" class="heading-element"><span>五层因特网协议栈</span>
 <a href="#%e4%ba%94%e5%b1%82%e5%9b%a0%e7%89%b9%e7%bd%91%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%ae%e6%a0%88" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>因特网协议栈由5个层次组成：物理层、链路层、网络层、传输层和应用层。因特网协议栈是一个理想模型。</p>
<p>下层为上层提供服务。越下面的层，越靠近硬件；越上面的层，越靠近用户。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/oYnb8OzPqg461Ux.png" alt="截屏2020-03-22上午12.23.35.png" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/oYnb8OzPqg461Ux.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/oYnb8OzPqg461Ux.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/oYnb8OzPqg461Ux.png?size=large 2x" data-title="截屏2020-03-22上午12.23.35.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: center">层次</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">功能</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">应用层（Application Layer）</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">支持网络应用，应用协议仅仅是网络应用的一个组成部分，运行在不同主机上的进程则使用应用层协议进行通信。</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">传输层（Transport Layer）</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">负责为信源和信宿提供应用程序进程间的数据传输服务，这一层上主要定义了两个传输协议，传输控制协议即TCP和用户数据报协议UDP。</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">网络层（Network Layer）</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">负责将<strong>数据报</strong>独立地从信源发送到信宿，主要解决路由选择、拥塞控制和网络互联等问题。</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">链路层（Link Layer）</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">负责将IP数据报封装成合适在物理网络上传输的<strong>帧</strong>格式并传输，或将从物理网络接收到的帧解封，取出IP数据报交给网络层。</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">物理层（Physical Layer）</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">负责将<strong>比特流</strong>在结点间传输，即负责物理传输。该层的协议既与链路有关也与传输介质有关。</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="osi模型" class="heading-element"><span>OSI模型</span>
 <a href="#osi%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>OSI模型由国际标准化组织（ISO）制定，实际并没有应用，只有理论。</p>
<p>OSI模型由7层组成：应用层、表示层、会话层、传输层、网络层、数据链路层、物理层。</p>
<h3 id="封装encapsulation" class="heading-element"><span>封装（Encapsulation）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%b0%81%e8%a3%85encapsulation" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>在发送端，</p>
<ol>
<li>
<p>应用层：将 <strong>应用层报文</strong>（application-layer message）M传送给传输层；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>传输层：接收报文M，附上传输层首部信息Ht（包括差错检测位信息等），构成 <strong>传输层报文段</strong>（transport-layer segment），将其传递给网络层；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>网络层：接收传输层报文段，附上网络层首部信息Hn（包括源和目的地址等），构成 <strong>网络层数据段</strong>（network-layer datagram），将其传递给网络层；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>链路层：接收网络层数据段，附上链路层首部信息Hl，构成 <strong>链路层帧</strong>（link-layer frame），将其传递给物理层；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>物理层：负责比特流物理传输。</p>
<p>在接收端以反方向重构报文段。</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/uBFK4rGifLvsHqE.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/uBFK4rGifLvsHqE.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/uBFK4rGifLvsHqE.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/uBFK4rGifLvsHqE.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="物理层概述" class="heading-element"><span>物理层概述</span>
 <a href="#%e7%89%a9%e7%90%86%e5%b1%82%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>在两个物理媒体间进行比特流传输，上层都是逻辑链接，只有物理层是实际的物理连接。</p>
<h3 id="物理层基本目标" class="heading-element"><span>物理层基本目标</span>
 <a href="#%e7%89%a9%e7%90%86%e5%b1%82%e5%9f%ba%e6%9c%ac%e7%9b%ae%e6%a0%87" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>保证发送信号“0”和“1”的正确性以及发送和接收的一致性；</li>
<li>比特流传输的模式、速度、持续时间和信号失真；</li>
<li>接口设计：引脚数目、功能等等；</li>
<li>信号传输的程序：如何安排传输过程和事件次序。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="物理层的基本特性" class="heading-element"><span>物理层的基本特性</span>
 <a href="#%e7%89%a9%e7%90%86%e5%b1%82%e7%9a%84%e5%9f%ba%e6%9c%ac%e7%89%b9%e6%80%a7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p><strong>机械特性</strong>：指明接口所用接线器的形状和尺寸、引线数目和排列、固定和锁定装置等；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>电气特性</strong>：指明传输模式、电压范围、编码、阻抗匹配、传输速率以及传输距离等等；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>功能特性</strong>：指明各条物理线路的功能，比如某条线上出现的某一电平的电压表示何种意义，</p>
<p>物理接口信号线按功能分为四类：数据线、控制线、定时线和地线；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>规程特性</strong>：指明各物理线路工作规程和时序的关系，比如对于不同功能的各种可能事件的出现顺序，</p>
<p>信号传输的模式：单工（仅单向通行）、半双工（双方通，但一个时刻仅一方通）、全双工（双方随时通）。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="基本通信原理" class="heading-element"><span>基本通信原理</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9f%ba%e6%9c%ac%e9%80%9a%e4%bf%a1%e5%8e%9f%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="基本概念" class="heading-element"><span>基本概念</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9f%ba%e6%9c%ac%e6%a6%82%e5%bf%b5" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>数据（data）：对于客观事实描述的物理符号，包括数字、文本、语言、图像等等；</li>
<li>信息（information）：数据的集合；</li>
<li>信号（signal）：数据传输中的表现形式，比如模拟信号、数字信号；</li>
<li>信道（channel）：往固定方向传输信息的媒介。</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>模拟传输VS数字传输</strong></p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">传输方式</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">优点</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">缺点</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">模拟</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">对信道有高利用率</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">不抗噪</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">数字</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">信号不易失真</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">需要更宽的带宽</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="信道特性" class="heading-element"><span>信道特性</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bf%a1%e9%81%93%e7%89%b9%e6%80%a7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p><strong>码元</strong>（Symbol）：承载信息量的基本信号单位。</p>
<p>下面是马原分级数 N 与所需bit位数 n 的关系（N个离散的值需要n个bits）</p>
<p>n=log2Nn=log2N</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/wxHkuoMDth7Bqpm.jpg" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/wxHkuoMDth7Bqpm.jpg?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/wxHkuoMDth7Bqpm.jpg?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/22/wxHkuoMDth7Bqpm.jpg?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>波特率</strong>（Baud rate）：传输码元的速率。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>比特率</strong>（Bit rate）：传输比特的速率。</p>
<p>波特率与比特率的关系</p>
<p>bit rate(b/s)=baud rate∗nbit rate(b/s)=baud rate∗n</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>信道容量</strong>（Channel capacity）：在一个信道中能够可靠地传送信息时可达速率的最小上界，单位 bps。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>频带宽度</strong>（Frequency bandwidth）：信道允许的信号频率范围，单位 Hz。</p>
<p>Frequency bandwidth=maximum bandwidth−minimum bandwidthFrequency bandwidth=maximum bandwidth−minimum bandwidth</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>传输延迟</strong>（Transmission delay）：包括发送到接受的处理事件、电信号的响应时间、中间介质的传输时间。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>奈奎斯特定理</strong>（Nyquist’s Law）</p>
<ol>
<li>对于理想的低通信号，在一个频带宽度为 W 的信道，其码元的最大传输速率 = 2W Baud</li>
<li>对于理想的带通信号，在一个频带宽度为 W 的信道，其码元的最大传输速率 = W Baud</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>香农定理</strong>（Shannon’s Formula）</p>
<p>信道的信息传输速率C（单位：bps）</p>
<p>C=Wlog2(1+S/N)C=Wlog2(1+S/N)</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>W - 带宽，单位 Hz</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>S - 信道的平均信号功率</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>N - 信道的高斯噪声功率</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>S/N - 信号功率与噪声功率之比（也可以叫信噪比）</p>
<p>一般情况下，信噪比不用 S/NS/N 表示，而是 10log10S/N10log10S/N ，单位为dB。</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="模拟数字信号传输" class="heading-element"><span>模拟/数字信号传输</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a8%a1%e6%8b%9f%e6%95%b0%e5%ad%97%e4%bf%a1%e5%8f%b7%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>模拟信道只能传输模拟信号，数字信道只能传输数字信号。</p>
<h4 id="调制解调器" class="heading-element"><span>调制解调器</span>
 <a href="#%e8%b0%83%e5%88%b6%e8%a7%a3%e8%b0%83%e5%99%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>数字/模拟信号 经过 <strong>调制</strong> 变成 <strong>模拟信号</strong>，如此可在 模拟信道 上传输，再经过 <strong>解调</strong> 变成 数字/模拟信号。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/4mKvzSkIDigxhFX.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/4mKvzSkIDigxhFX.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/4mKvzSkIDigxhFX.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/4mKvzSkIDigxhFX.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="编码解码器" class="heading-element"><span>编码解码器</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bc%96%e7%a0%81%e8%a7%a3%e7%a0%81%e5%99%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>数字/模拟信号 经过 <strong>编码</strong> 变成 <strong>数字信号</strong>，如此可在 数字信道 上传输，再经过 <strong>解码</strong> 变成 数字/模拟信号。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/OcMLw2JjiA9FsSP.png" alt="截屏2020-03-23上午1.37.30.png" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/OcMLw2JjiA9FsSP.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/OcMLw2JjiA9FsSP.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/OcMLw2JjiA9FsSP.png?size=large 2x" data-title="截屏2020-03-23上午1.37.30.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="调制modulation数字信号到模拟信号" class="heading-element"><span>调制（Modulation）：数字信号到模拟信号</span>
 <a href="#%e8%b0%83%e5%88%b6modulation%e6%95%b0%e5%ad%97%e4%bf%a1%e5%8f%b7%e5%88%b0%e6%a8%a1%e6%8b%9f%e4%bf%a1%e5%8f%b7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>从数字信号到模拟信号的调制主要有三种方法：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>调幅</strong>（Amplitude Modulation，<strong>AM</strong>）</p>
<p>把数字信号转化成不同幅度的正弦信号。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/tsgLBTpczPWhOHS.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/tsgLBTpczPWhOHS.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/tsgLBTpczPWhOHS.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/tsgLBTpczPWhOHS.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>调频</strong>（Frequency Modulation，<strong>FM</strong>）</p>
<p>把数字信号转化成不同频率的正弦信号。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/RJEuCxXSblUhyfV.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/RJEuCxXSblUhyfV.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/RJEuCxXSblUhyfV.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/RJEuCxXSblUhyfV.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>调相</strong>（Phase Modulation，<strong>PM</strong>）</p>
<p>把数字信号转化成不同相位的正弦信号。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/2NDtUwYbpmuHPVo.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/2NDtUwYbpmuHPVo.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/2NDtUwYbpmuHPVo.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/2NDtUwYbpmuHPVo.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="脉码调制pulse-code-modulation-pcm" class="heading-element"><span>脉码调制（Pulse Code Modulation, PCM）</span>
 <a href="#%e8%84%89%e7%a0%81%e8%b0%83%e5%88%b6pulse-code-modulation-pcm" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>模拟信号变成数字信号。</p>
<p>脉码调制步骤：</p>
<ol>
<li>
<p>采样（Sampling system）</p>
<p>采样频率是信号频率的两倍，则可不失真地恢复原始信号。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>量化（Quantify）</p>
<p>取整采样信号。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>编码（Coding）</p>
<p>量化后的信号编码成二进制。</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/ze59JcGyOojH2Dx.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/ze59JcGyOojH2Dx.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/ze59JcGyOojH2Dx.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/ze59JcGyOojH2Dx.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="数字信号编码digital-signal-coding" class="heading-element"><span>数字信号编码（Digital signal coding）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%95%b0%e5%ad%97%e4%bf%a1%e5%8f%b7%e7%bc%96%e7%a0%81digital-signal-coding" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>数字信号到数字信号。</p>
<h5 id="不归零编码non-return-to-zero-nrz" class="heading-element"><span>不归零编码（Non-Return-To-Zero, NRZ）</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%8d%e5%bd%92%e9%9b%b6%e7%bc%96%e7%a0%81non-return-to-zero-nrz" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p>主要介绍两种不归零编码。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Non-Return-To-Zero Level (<strong>NRZ-L</strong>) Coding</p>
<p>高电平表示“1”，低电平表示“0”。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/XmcGZnlLOg92azH.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/XmcGZnlLOg92azH.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/XmcGZnlLOg92azH.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/XmcGZnlLOg92azH.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>NRZ-L的优点：简单好实现</p>
<p>NRZ-L的缺点：</p>
<ul>
<li>难以分清二进制一位的开始和结束，所以必须要带<strong>同步时钟</strong>（外同步）来同步。可以把上图的虚线当作是同步时钟，当把虚线去掉是，相同电平的信号就不好判断开始和结束了。</li>
<li>在传输全“1”或全“0”信号时，此时传输的只有直流分量（傅立叶分不出正弦或余弦分量），这样线路上会有比较大的噪声。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>反向不归零编码（<strong>NRZ-I</strong>）</p>
<p>遇“1”反向。只能解决NRZ-L的部分问题（全“1”问题，不再是直流）</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/KQJyzFGPtanmhLk.jpg" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/KQJyzFGPtanmhLk.jpg?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/KQJyzFGPtanmhLk.jpg?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/KQJyzFGPtanmhLk.jpg?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>外同步</strong>（External synchronization）</p>
<p>给系统一个同步时钟信号，设置一个周期的宽度。</p>
<p>外同步有诸多不便，于是有了自同步的曼切斯特编码。</p>
<h5 id="曼切斯特编码manchester-encoding" class="heading-element"><span>曼切斯特编码（Manchester encoding）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%9b%bc%e5%88%87%e6%96%af%e7%89%b9%e7%bc%96%e7%a0%81manchester-encoding" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p>每个编码由两段组成，“1”：先高后低；“0”：先低后高（可以反过来定义）。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/CwpZhdnVO65m2DX.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/CwpZhdnVO65m2DX.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/CwpZhdnVO65m2DX.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/CwpZhdnVO65m2DX.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>曼切斯特编码的优点（解决了不归零编码的问题）：</p>
<ul>
<li>自同步，不需要同步时钟；</li>
<li>直流分量为0。</li>
</ul>
<p>曼切斯特编码的缺点：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>基频增加</strong>：基频是不归零编码的两倍，从而比特率变成了不归零编码的一半；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>二义性</strong>：组合情况有两种。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/3vlYkrz47V6qC1w.jpg" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/3vlYkrz47V6qC1w.jpg?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/3vlYkrz47V6qC1w.jpg?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/3vlYkrz47V6qC1w.jpg?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h5 id="差分曼切斯特编码differential-manchester-encoding" class="heading-element"><span>差分曼切斯特编码（Differential Manchester encoding）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%b7%ae%e5%88%86%e6%9b%bc%e5%88%87%e6%96%af%e7%89%b9%e7%bc%96%e7%a0%81differential-manchester-encoding" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p>解决曼切斯特编码的二义性。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>“1”：自己的前半波与前一个编码的后半波相同；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>“0”：自己的前半波与前一个编码的后半波相反。</p>
<p>有两种画法，初始为高、初始为低，两种画法结果对称。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/mdYhZEKHulpkjTW.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/mdYhZEKHulpkjTW.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/mdYhZEKHulpkjTW.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/mdYhZEKHulpkjTW.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>差分曼切斯特编码的优点：</p>
<ul>
<li>解决NRZ问题</li>
<li>解决二义性问题</li>
</ul>
<p>差分曼切斯特编码的缺点（同曼切斯特编码）：</p>
<ul>
<li>基频翻倍</li>
<li>高频噪声增加</li>
</ul>
<h5 id="块编码block-encoding" class="heading-element"><span>块编码（Block encoding）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9d%97%e7%bc%96%e7%a0%81block-encoding" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><ol>
<li>将原信号每 m bits 分为一块；</li>
<li>把 m bits 的每块映射成 n bits 的块（m &lt; n）；</li>
<li>将 n bits 的块重新组合起来。</li>
</ol>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/5D78VTnaSXjMyfR.png" alt="img" srcset="https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/5D78VTnaSXjMyfR.png?size=small, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/5D78VTnaSXjMyfR.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://i.loli.net/2020/03/23/5D78VTnaSXjMyfR.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="多路复用multiplexing" class="heading-element"><span>多路复用（Multiplexing）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8multiplexing" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="频分多路复用frequency-division-multiplexingfdm" class="heading-element"><span>频分多路复用（Frequency division multiplexing，FDM）</span>
 <a href="#%e9%a2%91%e5%88%86%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8frequency-division-multiplexingfdm" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>见 <a href="https://gy23333.github.io/2020/03/16/%e3%80%8a%e8%ae%a1%e7%ae%97%e6%9c%ba%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c-%e8%87%aa%e9%a1%b6%e5%90%91%e4%b8%8b%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e3%80%8b%e7%ac%94%e8%ae%b0/#%e9%a2%91%e5%88%86%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8%ef%bc%88FDM%ef%bc%89"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">频分多路复用</a> 。</p>
<h4 id="时分多路复用time-division-multiplexingtdm" class="heading-element"><span>时分多路复用（Time division multiplexing，TDM）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%97%b6%e5%88%86%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8time-division-multiplexingtdm" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>见 <a href="https://gy23333.github.io/2020/03/16/%e3%80%8a%e8%ae%a1%e7%ae%97%e6%9c%ba%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c-%e8%87%aa%e9%a1%b6%e5%90%91%e4%b8%8b%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e3%80%8b%e7%ac%94%e8%ae%b0/#%e6%97%b6%e5%88%86%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8%ef%bc%88TDM%ef%bc%89"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">时分多路复用</a> 。</p>
<h4 id="波分多路复用wavelength-division-multiplexingwdm" class="heading-element"><span>波分多路复用（Wavelength division multiplexing，WDM）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%b3%a2%e5%88%86%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8wavelength-division-multiplexingwdm" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>和FDM原理相同，但主要在光波中采用。</p>
<h4 id="码分多路复用code-division-multiplexingcdm" class="heading-element"><span>码分多路复用（Code division multiplexing，CDM）</span>
 <a href="#%e7%a0%81%e5%88%86%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8code-division-multiplexingcdm" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>举例说明</p>
<p>每台设备都给一个不同向量的码片，比如手机A的码片为A，手机B的码片为B。不同设备的码片正交，即</p>
<p>{A×B=0A×A=1{A×B=0A×A=1</p>
<p>要向手机A发送数据a，向手机B发送数据b，则在信道中发送 a×A+b×Ba×A+b×B。</p>
<p>在手机A接收数据时，将接收到的信号乘A。</p>
<p>(a×A+b×B)×A=a×A×A+b×B×A=a(a×A+b×B)×A=a×A×A+b×B×A=a</p>
<p>同理手机B，如此两台设备同时利用一条信道传输，并成功分离各自的数据。</p>
<h2 id="延时丢包吞吐量" class="heading-element"><span>延时、丢包、吞吐量</span>
 <a href="#%e5%bb%b6%e6%97%b6%e4%b8%a2%e5%8c%85%e5%90%9e%e5%90%90%e9%87%8f" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="延时delay" class="heading-element"><span>延时（delay）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%bb%b6%e6%97%b6delay" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>现实中的计算机系统不是理想系统，事件是随机突发的，所以不可避免的存在延时。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/delay.png" alt="delay.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/delay.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/delay.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/delay.png?size=large 2x" data-title="delay.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>数据包的延时由四个部分组成：</p>
<p>dnodal=dprop+dqueue+dtrans+dpropdnodal=dprop+dqueue+dtrans+dprop</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>处理时延</strong>（Nodal Processing Delay，dprocdproc）</p>
<p>路由器接收到分组对其进行处理的时间（比如差错检测），耗时很短，毫秒级。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>排队时延</strong>（Queuing Delay，dqueuedqueue）</p>
<p>分组在链路上等待传输的时间，取决于先期到达的正在排队等待向链路传输的分组数量。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>传输时延</strong>（Transmission Delay，dtransdtrans）</p>
<p>将分组的比特流传输到链路的时间（比如进行编码转换成查分曼切斯特编码的时间）。</p>
<p>如分组长度 L ，传输速率 R bps，则其传输时延为：</p>
<p>dtrans=L/Rdtrans=L/R</p>
<p>所以传输时间取决于分组长度和传输速率。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>传播时延</strong>（Propagation Delay，$$）</p>
<p>信号在媒体上传播的时间。</p>
<p>如物理链路的长度 d，传播速度 s m/sec，则其传播时延为：</p>
<p>dprop=d/sdprop=d/s</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="丢包packet-loss" class="heading-element"><span>丢包（Packet Loss）</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%a2%e5%8c%85packet-loss" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>流量强度（traffic intensity）代表了路由器上排队的拥堵率。</p>
<p>traffic intensity=(L×a)/Rtraffic intensity=(L×a)/R</p>
<p>其中，L —— 分组长度（bits）；</p>
<p>R —— 链路带宽（bps）；</p>
<p>a —— 平均分组到达速率</p>
<ul>
<li>流量强度接近0时，几乎没有分组到达，排队延时很小；</li>
<li>流量强度0～1时，平均排队长度越来越长，排队延时越来越长；</li>
<li>流量强度接近1时，存在到达率超过传输时间间隔，拥堵。</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/traffic%20intensity.png" alt="traffic intensity.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/traffic%20intensity.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/traffic%20intensity.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/traffic%20intensity.png?size=large 2x" data-title="traffic intensity.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>路由器的排队容量是有限的，当分组到达一个已满的队列时，路由器将丢弃该分组，产生丢包。</p>
<h3 id="吞吐量throughput" class="heading-element"><span>吞吐量（Throughput）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%90%9e%e5%90%90%e9%87%8fthroughput" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>从主机A到主机B传文件，B接收文件的速率为<strong>瞬时吞吐量</strong>（instantaneous throughput），单位bps；所有时间的平均速率为<strong>平均吞吐量</strong>（average throughput）。</p>
<p>串联链路吞吐量取决于<strong>瓶颈链路</strong>（bottleneck link）。</p>
<p>Throughput=min{R1,R2,&hellip;,RN}Throughput=min{R1,R2,&hellip;,RN}</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Throughput.png" alt="Throughput.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Throughput.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Throughput.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Throughput.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Throughput.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h1 id="应用层application-layer" class="heading-element"><span>应用层（Application Layer）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ba%94%e7%94%a8%e5%b1%82application-layer" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><h2 id="网络应用原理" class="heading-element"><span>网络应用原理</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c%e5%ba%94%e7%94%a8%e5%8e%9f%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>可以在不同类型主机运行；</li>
<li>可以在不同终端间相互通讯；</li>
<li>在编写网络应用的过程中，不需要考虑网络核心设备，网络核心不会允许应用；</li>
<li>端系统上的应用可以快速开发，而且易于传播。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="网络应用结构" class="heading-element"><span>网络应用结构</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c%e5%ba%94%e7%94%a8%e7%bb%93%e6%9e%84" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="客户机-服务器体系结构client-server-architecture" class="heading-element"><span>客户机-服务器体系结构（Client-server architecture）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ae%a2%e6%88%b7%e6%9c%ba-%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1%e5%99%a8%e4%bd%93%e7%b3%bb%e7%bb%93%e6%9e%84client-server-architecture" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>例如：HTTP、IMAP、FTP</p>
<p><strong>服务器</strong>：</p>
<ul>
<li>永远在线；</li>
<li>IP地址恒定；</li>
<li>服务器往往在数据中心，通过多台服务器进行扩展。</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>客户机</strong>：</p>
<ul>
<li>可以和服务器进行通信；</li>
<li>可能间断性连接网络；</li>
<li>可能是动态的IP地址；</li>
<li>客户机之间不会直接通信；</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="点对点体系结构peer-peer-architecture" class="heading-element"><span>点对点体系结构（Peer-peer architecture）</span>
 <a href="#%e7%82%b9%e5%af%b9%e7%82%b9%e4%bd%93%e7%b3%bb%e7%bb%93%e6%9e%84peer-peer-architecture" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>没有一个一直在线的服务器；</li>
<li>任意端系统之间直接进行通信；</li>
<li>每个点（peer）向其他的点请求服务，同时作为回报也会提供相应的服务；</li>
</ul>
<p>优点：<strong>自扩展性</strong>（self-scalability）：新的点都会提供服务容量和负荷。</p>
<p>缺点：每个点都是间断性连接，而且IP地址会改变。</p>
<p>例子：P2P的文件分享。</p>
<h3 id="进程通信processes-communicating" class="heading-element"><span>进程通信（Processes Communicating）</span>
 <a href="#%e8%bf%9b%e7%a8%8b%e9%80%9a%e4%bf%a1processes-communicating" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="客户机和服务器进程" class="heading-element"><span>客户机和服务器进程</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ae%a2%e6%88%b7%e6%9c%ba%e5%92%8c%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1%e5%99%a8%e8%bf%9b%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p><strong>进程</strong>（Processe）：一台主机上运行的程序。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>在同一台主机上，两个进程通过<strong>进程间通信</strong>（inter-process communication）来进行通信。进程间通信由操作系统定义；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>不同主机之间，进程通信同过报文交换，</p>
<p>比如并行计算中的MP和MPI，MP（Multi Processing）只能用于同一台主机间的通信，MPI（Message Processing Interface）主要用于不同主机之间的通信，也适用于同一台主机。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>客户机进程</strong>（client process）：发起通信的进程。</p>
<p><strong>服务器进程</strong>（server process）：等待连接的进程。</p>
<p>P2P应用也存在客户机进程和服务器进程。</p>
<h4 id="套接字sockets" class="heading-element"><span>套接字（Sockets）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a5%97%e6%8e%a5%e5%ad%97sockets" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>进程之间通过socket来接收/发送消息。</p>
<p>socket在进程通信中的作用相当于一个信封：</p>
<ul>
<li>通信的信息需要装进socket</li>
<li>应用层下的各层作为基础设施，将信传到另一个进程</li>
<li>两个进程间的通讯会有两个socket</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/socket.png" alt="socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/socket.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/socket.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/socket.png?size=large 2x" data-title="socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="进程寻址addressing-processes" class="heading-element"><span>进程寻址（Addressing Processes）</span>
 <a href="#%e8%bf%9b%e7%a8%8b%e5%af%bb%e5%9d%80addressing-processes" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>如果两个主机之间的进程进行通信，发送端不仅要知道接收端的IP地址还需要知道进程相应的端口号。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><strong>IP地址</strong>：IPv4中32位IP，负责找到接收端主机。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>端口号</strong>（port number）：每台主机都可能运行着多个进程，每个进程对应一个端口号。</p>
<p>比如，HTTP服务端口号80、邮件服务端口号25</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="应用层协议application-layer-protocols" class="heading-element"><span>应用层协议（Application-Layer Protocols）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ba%94%e7%94%a8%e5%b1%82%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%aeapplication-layer-protocols" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>网络应用的开发必须遵守网络协议。</p>
<h4 id="应用层协议的分类" class="heading-element"><span>应用层协议的分类</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ba%94%e7%94%a8%e5%b1%82%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%ae%e7%9a%84%e5%88%86%e7%b1%bb" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p><strong>公开网络协议</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>定义在RFC中</li>
<li>统一标准，易于相互操作</li>
<li>例如：HTTP、SMTP</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>专用网络协议</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>一些非公开的网络协议</li>
<li>例如：Skype</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="应用层协议内容" class="heading-element"><span>应用层协议内容</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ba%94%e7%94%a8%e5%b1%82%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%ae%e5%86%85%e5%ae%b9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>应用层协议定义了</p>
<ul>
<li>消息交换的类型：比如请求、响应</li>
<li>消息的语法：消息中有哪些字段以及这些字段如何定义</li>
<li>消息的语义：消息字段内容的含义</li>
<li>规则：进程什么时候、如何发送/接收消息</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="app对传输服务的需求" class="heading-element"><span>app对传输服务的需求</span>
 <a href="#app%e5%af%b9%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1%e7%9a%84%e9%9c%80%e6%b1%82" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>
<p><strong>数据完整性</strong>（data integrity）</p>
<p>一些app需要100%可靠的文件传输，比如文件传输；有一些运行一部分的丢失，比如语音。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>时效性</strong>（timing）</p>
<p>一些app要求较少的延时，比如对话直播。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>吞吐率</strong>（throughput）</p>
<p>吞吐率，即<strong>最小带宽</strong>，一些app存在一个吞吐率下限才能正常使用，比如视频音频等多媒体；有些app运行弹性的吞吐率，比如邮件传输，吞吐率小可以慢慢传过去。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_appsRequirements.png" alt="appsRequirements.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_appsRequirements.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_appsRequirements.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_appsRequirements.png?size=large 2x" data-title="appsRequirements.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="网络传输协议服务" class="heading-element"><span>网络传输协议服务</span>
 <a href="#%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%ae%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p><strong>传输层</strong>提供为应用层提供的两种传输服务。</p>
<h4 id="tcp" class="heading-element"><span>TCP</span>
 <a href="#tcp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>传输控制协议（TCP）</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>面向连接</strong>（connection-oriented）：需要客户端和服务器之间能够建立连接</li>
<li><strong>可靠传输</strong>（reliable transport）：数据完整性高</li>
<li><strong>流量控制</strong>（flow control）：发送方不能发送太多数据导致接收方过载</li>
<li><strong>阻塞控制</strong>（congestion control）：不能有太多个主机同时发送导致网络过载</li>
<li>不提供的服务：时效性、最小带宽（吞吐率）、安全性</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="udp" class="heading-element"><span>UDP</span>
 <a href="#udp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>UDP是一种<strong>不提供不必要服务</strong>的轻量传输协议。优点是速度快、灵活性好。</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>不需要建立连接</strong></li>
<li><strong>不可靠的数据传输</strong></li>
<li>不提供的服务：基本都不提供，不提供包括可靠传输、流量控制、阻塞控制、时效性、最小带宽（吞吐率）、安全性</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="不同app选择的网络传输协议" class="heading-element"><span>不同app选择的网络传输协议</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%8d%e5%90%8capp%e9%80%89%e6%8b%a9%e7%9a%84%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%ae" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
