</h4><p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_appsProtocols.png" alt="img" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_appsProtocols.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_appsProtocols.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_appsProtocols.png?size=large 2x" data-title="img" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="web和http" class="heading-element"><span>Web和HTTP</span>
 <a href="#web%e5%92%8chttp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>World Wide Web 中的网页由超链接（hyperlink）连接。</p>
<ul>
<li>页面由很多对象（object）组成，对象存储在服务器中；</li>
<li>对象有多种类型，可以是HTML文件，JPEG图片，动态脚本等等；</li>
<li>网页以HTML文件为基础，包括了许多参考对象，每个对象都可以通过URL来寻址。例如一张图片的URL为<code>www.someshcool.edu/someDept/pic.gif</code>，其中<code>www.someshcool.edu</code>为主机名，<code>/someDept/pic.gif</code>为路径名。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="http概述" class="heading-element"><span>HTTP概述</span>
 <a href="#http%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>超文本传输协议（hypertext transfer protocol, HTTP）</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>网页的<strong>应用层</strong>协议</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>基于<strong>客户机-服务器体系结构</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>客户机：负责请求、接收和显示Web对象</li>
<li>服务器：Web服务器负责发送对象，响应客户机请求</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>HTTP的传输层使用</p>
<p>TCP</p>
<ol>
<li>客户机发起TCP连接（创建socket，<strong>端口号80</strong>）</li>
<li>服务器接收TCP连接</li>
<li>在浏览器和网页服务器之间进行HTTP信息的交换</li>
<li>TCP连接可以断开</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<p>HTTP是无状态的
​ 服务器不会保留之前客户机发的请求信息。
​ 协议要维持状态是很复杂的：保留之前的历史记录很消耗资源；如果客户机或着服务器有死机，它们的状态会不一致，还需要重新同步，这很麻烦。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>HTTP消息类型：请求（request）与响应（response）</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="http连接类型" class="heading-element"><span>HTTP连接类型</span>
 <a href="#http%e8%bf%9e%e6%8e%a5%e7%b1%bb%e5%9e%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="非持久性连接non-persistent-http" class="heading-element"><span>非持久性连接（Non-persistent HTTP）</span>
 <a href="#%e9%9d%9e%e6%8c%81%e4%b9%85%e6%80%a7%e8%bf%9e%e6%8e%a5non-persistent-http" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><h5 id="非持久性http步骤" class="heading-element"><span>非持久性HTTP步骤</span>
 <a href="#%e9%9d%9e%e6%8c%81%e4%b9%85%e6%80%a7http%e6%ad%a5%e9%aa%a4" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><ol>
<li>
<p>TCP连接开启</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>通过这个TCP连接最多传输一个对象</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>TCP连接关闭</p>
<p>如果要加载多个对象时，需要多次非持久性HTTP连接。</p>
</li>
</ol>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Non-persistent%20HTTP%281%29.png" alt="Non-persistent%20HTTP(1).png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Non-persistent%20HTTP%281%29.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Non-persistent%20HTTP%281%29.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Non-persistent%20HTTP%281%29.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Non-persistent%20HTTP(1).png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/>
<img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Non-persistent%20HTTP%282%29.png" alt="Non-persistent%20HTTP(2).png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Non-persistent%20HTTP%282%29.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Non-persistent%20HTTP%282%29.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Non-persistent%20HTTP%282%29.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Non-persistent%20HTTP(2).png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h5 id="非持久性http响应时间" class="heading-element"><span>非持久性HTTP响应时间</span>
 <a href="#%e9%9d%9e%e6%8c%81%e4%b9%85%e6%80%a7http%e5%93%8d%e5%ba%94%e6%97%b6%e9%97%b4" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><p><strong>RTT</strong>：往返时间（Round Trip Time）,一个很小的数据包（处理文件的时间可忽略）从客户机传到服务器再传回来的时间。</p>
<p><strong>HTTP响应时间</strong>（一个对象）：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>1个RTT：建立TCP连接的时间</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>1个RTT：HTTP请求以及收到HTTP响应的前几个字符的时间</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>对象/文件传输的时间</p>
<p>对一个对象来说，非持久性HTTP响应时间为</p>
<p>Nonpersistent HTTP response time=2RTT+file transmission timeNonpersistent HTTP response time=2RTT+file transmission time</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/NetWork%20Non-persistent%20HTTP%20response%20time.png" alt="Non-persistent response time.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/NetWork%20Non-persistent%20HTTP%20response%20time.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/NetWork%20Non-persistent%20HTTP%20response%20time.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/NetWork%20Non-persistent%20HTTP%20response%20time.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Non-persistent response time.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>例题：如果一个网页包含1个HTML和10个对象，则非持久性HTTP响应需要多少时间？</p>
<p>2RTT×(1+10)+total file transmission time2RTT×(1+10)+total file transmission time</p>
<h5 id="非持久性http的问题" class="heading-element"><span>非持久性HTTP的问题</span>
 <a href="#%e9%9d%9e%e6%8c%81%e4%b9%85%e6%80%a7http%e7%9a%84%e9%97%ae%e9%a2%98" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><ul>
<li>每传输一个对象都需要耗费 2RTT2RTT</li>
<li>每建立一个TCP连接都会对操作系统（OS）产生负荷</li>
<li>并行抓取：浏览器常常开多个并行的TCP连接去抓取对象</li>
</ul>
<p>例题：一个网页包含1个HTML和10张图片，共有5个并行的TCP连接，则非持久性HTTP响应需要多少个RTT？
 首先传输HTML需要 2RTT2RTT 的时间，5个并行的TCP连接传输10个对象需要2个 2RTT2RTT 的时间。</p>
<p>RTT in Response Time=2RTT+2×2RTT=6RTTRTT in Response Time=2RTT+2×2RTT=6RTT</p>
<h4 id="持久性连接persistent-http" class="heading-element"><span>持久性连接（Persistent HTTP）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8c%81%e4%b9%85%e6%80%a7%e8%bf%9e%e6%8e%a5persistent-http" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><h5 id="持久性http步骤" class="heading-element"><span>持久性HTTP步骤</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8c%81%e4%b9%85%e6%80%a7http%e6%ad%a5%e9%aa%a4" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><ol>
<li>开启TCP连接</li>
<li>通过这一个TCP连接可以传多个对象</li>
<li>TCP连接关闭</li>
</ol>
<h5 id="持久性http特点http11" class="heading-element"><span>持久性HTTP特点（HTTP1.1）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8c%81%e4%b9%85%e6%80%a7http%e7%89%b9%e7%82%b9http11" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><ul>
<li>服务器在发送响应后保持连接开启状态</li>
<li>后续这个客户机\服务器的HTTP消息都通过该开启的连接发送</li>
<li>两种发送对象方式：HTTP1.1采用流水的方式发送：一次性把对象全发了；另一种是客户机接收到一个对象后接着发下一个对象的请求</li>
<li>至少需要1个RTT发完所有对象</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="dns" class="heading-element"><span>DNS</span>
 <a href="#dns" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p> 域名系统（Domain Name System，DNS）通过分布式的数据库来实现IP地址和域名的映射。</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>层级结构的域名服务器提供分布式的数据库</strong></li>
<li><strong>应用层协议</strong>：主机和域名服务器通过通信来实现IP地址和域名的转换</li>
</ul>
<p>DNS作为一个<strong>网络核心功能</strong>，为什么要放在应用层？
 与网络结构设计理念有关，网络中主机很多映射很复杂，希望将复杂度留在端系统中，而不是在网络核心。</p>
<h3 id="dns服务" class="heading-element"><span>DNS服务</span>
 <a href="#dns%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>IP地址和域名的转换</li>
<li>主机的别名</li>
<li>邮件服务的别名</li>
<li>负荷分配：有些Web可能有多个服务器，即会有多个IP地址对应一个域名，可调整IP地址的顺序以分配负荷。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="dns分布式层级的数据库" class="heading-element"><span>DNS：分布式、层级的数据库</span>
 <a href="#dns%e5%88%86%e5%b8%83%e5%bc%8f%e5%b1%82%e7%ba%a7%e7%9a%84%e6%95%b0%e6%8d%ae%e5%ba%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>为什么要选用分布的DNS，而不采用集中式的DNS？</p>
<ul>
<li>单点可能失效：一个故障就gg了</li>
<li>流量问题：所有客户机都访问一个域名服务器，会产生很大的流量</li>
<li>远程的集中式数据库：客户机要访问可能要花费很多时间，RTT会很大，造成大时延</li>
</ul>
<p> DNS采用三层结构</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_DNS%20Server.png" alt="DNS Server.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_DNS%20Server.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_DNS%20Server.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_DNS%20Server.png?size=large 2x" data-title="DNS Server.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>一个客户机得到<code>www.amazon.com</code>的IP地址的步骤：</p>
<ol>
<li>客户机先查询根域名服务器，得到顶级域名服务器<code>.com DNS server</code>的地址；</li>
<li>客户机查询顶级域名服务器<code>.com DNS server</code>，得到权威域名服务器<code>amazon.com DNS server</code>的地址；</li>
<li>客户机查询权威域名服务器<code>amazon.com DNS server</code>，得到<code>www.amazon.com</code>的IP地址</li>
</ol>
<h4 id="根域名服务器root-name-server" class="heading-element"><span>根域名服务器（Root Name Server）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a0%b9%e5%9f%9f%e5%90%8d%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1%e5%99%a8root-name-server" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>官方的服务器，是连接的最后的方法（如果知道下级域名服务器的地址就不需要再从头开始查询根域名服务器，不然会对根域名服务器产生很大的流量负荷）</li>
<li>对网络运行相当重要，离开根域名服务器网络无法正常工作</li>
<li>域名系统安全扩展（Domain Name System Security Extensions，DNSSEC） —— 对DNS提供给DNS客户端（解析器）的DNS数据来源进行认证，并验证不存在性和校验数据完整性验证。</li>
<li>ICANN（互联网名称与数字地址分配机构，Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers）—— 管理根域名服务器的组织</li>
</ul>
<p>世界上现在有13个根域名服务器，分布在世界各地。</p>
<h4 id="顶层域名服务器top-level-domain-server-tld" class="heading-element"><span>顶层域名服务器（Top-Level Domain Server, TLD）</span>
 <a href="#%e9%a1%b6%e5%b1%82%e5%9f%9f%e5%90%8d%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1%e5%99%a8top-level-domain-server-tld" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>各种类型的TLD，比如<code>.com</code>、<code>.org</code>、<code>net</code>、<code>.edu</code>等等，国家的TLD，比如<code>.cn</code>、<code>.uk</code>等等。</li>
<li>Network Solutions：管理<code>.com</code>、<code>net</code>TLD的组织</li>
<li>Educause：管理<code>.edu</code>的组织</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="权威域名服务器authoritative-domain-server" class="heading-element"><span>权威域名服务器（Authoritative Domain Server）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%9d%83%e5%a8%81%e5%9f%9f%e5%90%8d%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1%e5%99%a8authoritative-domain-server" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>组织自己的DNS服务器，用来提供组织内部的域名到IP地址的映射</li>
<li>由组织自己或者服务提供商来维护</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="本地域名服务器local-dns-name-server" class="heading-element"><span>本地域名服务器（Local DNS Name Server）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%9c%ac%e5%9c%b0%e5%9f%9f%e5%90%8d%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1%e5%99%a8local-dns-name-server" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>严格来说不属于层级结构</li>
<li>每个ISP都会有一个本地域名服务器，也叫做<strong>默认域名服务器</strong>（default name server）</li>
<li>当主机要进行DNS查询时，查询会被直接送到本地的DNS服务器。</li>
<li>作用：
<ul>
<li>缓存：可以缓存最近收到的域名到IP地址的映射（缓存有时效，会过期）</li>
<li>代理：可以作为代理，代替主机在层级结构中进行查询</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="dns查询方法" class="heading-element"><span>DNS查询方法</span>
 <a href="#dns%e6%9f%a5%e8%af%a2%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="迭代查询iterated-query" class="heading-element"><span>迭代查询（iterated query）</span>
 <a href="#%e8%bf%ad%e4%bb%a3%e6%9f%a5%e8%af%a2iterated-query" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> 被联系到的服务器会将后一个服务器的名字反馈回来，即“我不认识这个域名，但是你可以去问那台服务器(=ﾟωﾟ)ﾉ”</p>
<p> 下面的迭代查询过程，利用本地域名服务器作为代理迭代查询域名对于的IP地址。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_iterated-query.png" alt="iterated query.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_iterated-query.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_iterated-query.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_iterated-query.png?size=large 2x" data-title="iterated query.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="递归查询recursive-query" class="heading-element"><span>递归查询（recursive query）</span>
 <a href="#%e9%80%92%e5%bd%92%e6%9f%a5%e8%af%a2recursive-query" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> 把域名解析的负担交给了联系到的域名服务器，这种方法对于高级的负担增加，所以一般采用迭代查询而不采用递归查询。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_recursive-query.png" alt="recursive query.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_recursive-query.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_recursive-query.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_recursive-query.png?size=large 2x" data-title="recursive query.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="dns缓存和更新" class="heading-element"><span>DNS缓存和更新</span>
 <a href="#dns%e7%bc%93%e5%ad%98%e5%92%8c%e6%9b%b4%e6%96%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>一旦域名服务器学习到了一个映射，它就会<strong>缓存</strong>这个映射。缓存往往在本地域名服务器里，这样可以减轻根域名服务器的压力。</li>
<li><strong>缓存有效时间TTL</strong>，过了有效时间该缓存就会被删除。</li>
<li><strong>更新/通知机制</strong>：由IETF制定的 RFC2136 标准。
 如果中途域名主机改变IP地址，整个网络可能都不知道真正的IP地址，直到TTL到时，所以需要更新/通知机制。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="dns记录和消息" class="heading-element"><span>DNS记录和消息</span>
 <a href="#dns%e8%ae%b0%e5%bd%95%e5%92%8c%e6%b6%88%e6%81%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="dns记录" class="heading-element"><span>DNS记录</span>
 <a href="#dns%e8%ae%b0%e5%bd%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> DNS的分布式数据库里存储了<strong>资源记录</strong>（resource record, RR）</p>
<p>RR的格式：<code>(name, value, type, ttl)</code></p>
<p><strong>type = A</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>name：主机名</li>
<li>value：对应的IP地址</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>type = NS</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>name：域（如<code>foo.com</code>）</li>
<li>value：对应的权威域名服务器的主机名</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>type = CNAME</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>name：别名</li>
<li>value：对应的规范主机名</li>
<li>比如 <code>www.ibm.com</code> 是 <code>servereast.backup2.ibm.com</code> 的别名，这与负荷的分配有关，可能有多个服务器。</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>type = MX</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>name：邮件服务器别名</li>
<li>value：对应的规范主机名</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="dns消息" class="heading-element"><span>DNS消息</span>
 <a href="#dns%e6%b6%88%e6%81%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> DNS有两种消息类型：查询（query）和回答（reply），两种消息格式相同。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_DNS-message.png" alt="DNS message.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_DNS-message.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_DNS-message.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_DNS-message.png?size=large 2x" data-title="DNS message.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="向dns数据库插入记录" class="heading-element"><span>向DNS数据库插入记录</span>
 <a href="#%e5%90%91dns%e6%95%b0%e6%8d%ae%e5%ba%93%e6%8f%92%e5%85%a5%e8%ae%b0%e5%bd%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>比如要创建一个<code>networkutopia.com</code>的网站</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>先在</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">.com</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>的TLD提供商 Network Solution 注册</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">networkutopia.com</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ul>
<li>提供信息：域名、权威域名服务器的IP地址</li>
<li>提供商会向<code>.com</code>TLD服务器插入 NS、A 的RR
(<code>networkutopia.com</code>, <code>dns1.networkutopia.com</code>, NS)
(<code>dns1.networkutopia.com</code>, <code>212.212.212.1</code>, A)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>在自己的权威域名服务器上进行配置</p>
<ul>
<li>插入<code>www.networkutopia.com</code>的type A记录</li>
<li>如果是邮件服务，插入<code>networkutopia.com</code>的type MX记录</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="dns查询工具" class="heading-element"><span>DNS查询工具</span>
 <a href="#dns%e6%9f%a5%e8%af%a2%e5%b7%a5%e5%85%b7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p> 在命令行用<code>nslookup</code>进行DNS查询。</p>
<h4 id="nslookup直接查询" class="heading-element"><span>nslookup直接查询</span>
 <a href="#nslookup%e7%9b%b4%e6%8e%a5%e6%9f%a5%e8%af%a2" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> 查询一个域名的A记录，如果没指定dns-server，用系统默认的dns服务器。</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">nslookup domain [dns-server]</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h4 id="nslookup查询其他记录" class="heading-element"><span>nslookup查询其他记录</span>
 <a href="#nslookup%e6%9f%a5%e8%af%a2%e5%85%b6%e4%bb%96%e8%ae%b0%e5%bd%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">nslookup -qt=type domain [dns-server]</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>type可以是以下这些类型：</p>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">type</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">类型</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">A</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">地址记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">AAAA</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">地址记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">AFSDB</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">Andrew文件系统数据库服务器记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">ATMA</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">ATM地址记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">CNAME</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">别名记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">HINFO</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">硬件配置记录，包括CPU、操作系统信息</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">ISDN</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">域名对应的ISDN号码</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">MB</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">存放指定邮箱的服务器</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">MG</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">邮件组记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">MINFO</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">邮件组和邮箱的信息记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">MR</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">改名的邮箱记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">MX</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">邮件服务器记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">NS</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">名字服务器记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">PTR</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">反向记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">RP</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">负责人记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">RT</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">路由穿透记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">SRV</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">TCP服务器信息记录</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">TXT</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">域名对应的文本信息</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">X25</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">域名对应的X.25地址记录</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="p2p" class="heading-element"><span>P2P</span>
 <a href="#p2p" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p> 点对点体系结构（Peer-peer architecture）</p>
<h3 id="p2p概述" class="heading-element"><span>P2P概述</span>
 <a href="#p2p%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>没有一个一直在线的服务器；</li>
<li>任意端系统之间直接进行通信；</li>
<li>每个点（peer）向其他的点请求服务，同时作为回报也会提供相应的服务；</li>
</ul>
<p>优点：<strong>自扩展性</strong>（self-scalability）：新的点都会提供服务容量和负荷。</p>
<p>缺点：每个点都是间断性连接，而且IP地址会改变。</p>
<p>例子：P2P的文件分享。</p>
<h3 id="文件分发客户机-服务器结构-vs-p2p" class="heading-element"><span>文件分发：客户机-服务器结构 vs P2P</span>
 <a href="#%e6%96%87%e4%bb%b6%e5%88%86%e5%8f%91%e5%ae%a2%e6%88%b7%e6%9c%ba-%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1%e5%99%a8%e7%bb%93%e6%9e%84-vs-p2p" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p> 从一个服务器分发大小为F的文件到N个节点需要多少时间？（每个节点上传和下载的速率都是有限的，网络中有足够的带宽）</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_file-distribution.png" alt="file distribution.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_file-distribution.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_file-distribution.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_file-distribution.png?size=large 2x" data-title="file distribution.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>如果选用<strong>客户机-服务器</strong>结构</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>服务器上传：需要上传这份文件 NN 次，上传速度为 usus，则需要的上传时间为 NF/usNF/us</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>客户机下载：每个客户机都需要下载文件，dmindmin 是客户机最小下载速度，则客户机下载的最大时间为 F/dminF/dmin</p>
<p> 客户机-服务器结构的分发时间</p>
<p>Dc_s≥max{NF/us,F/dmin}Dc_s≥max{NF/us,F/dmin}</p>
<p> 此处的N导致耗费的时间随要下载的节点的数量线性增长，当要下载的节点数目大时，要耗费相当多的时间。</p>
<p> 不需要先上传完再下载，参考<a href="https://gy23333.github.io/2020/03/16/%e3%80%8a%e8%ae%a1%e7%ae%97%e6%9c%ba%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c-%e8%87%aa%e9%a1%b6%e5%90%91%e4%b8%8b%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e3%80%8b%e7%ac%94%e8%ae%b0/#%e5%88%86%e7%bb%84%e4%ba%a4%e6%8d%a2%ef%bc%88Packet-Switching%ef%bc%89"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">第一章/网络核心/分组交换</a>，以分组为单位发送，可以忽略上传到下载的时间。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>如果选用<strong>P2P</strong>结构</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>服务器上传：服务器至少要上传1次文件，上传时间为 F/usF/us</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>客户机下载：每个客户机都要下载文件，客户机最大下载时间为F/dminF/dmin</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>客户机上传：每个下载了文件的客户机都可以上传文件，此时总上传速率可以达到us+∑nuius+∑nui</p>
<p> P2P结构的分发时间</p>
<p>DP2P≥max{F/us,F/dmin,NF/(us+∑nui)}DP2P≥max{F/us,F/dmin,NF/(us+∑nui)}</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p>客户机-服务器结构和P2P分发时间对比</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_vsPic.png" alt="vsPic.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_vsPic.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_vsPic.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_vsPic.png?size=large 2x" data-title="vsPic.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="bittorrent" class="heading-element"><span>BitTorrent</span>
 <a href="#bittorrent" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>文件分为大小为 256Kb的块（chunk）</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>每个节点负责上传和下载的文件块</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>追踪器（tracker）：追踪参加洪流的节点</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>洪流（torrent）：有一组节点相互交换文件块</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>新的节点想下载文件，先询问追踪器参加的节点，再从相近的节点处下载文件块</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_P2P-file.png" alt="P2P file.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_P2P-file.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_P2P-file.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_P2P-file.png?size=large 2x" data-title="P2P file.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>节点加入洪流：</p>
<ul>
<li>本身没有文件块，但是随着时间的推移会从其他节点获取文件块</li>
<li>需要在追踪器进行登记，并且一般连接临近的节点</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>下载时，节点会上传文件块到其他节点</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>节点可以更改交换文件块的节点</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>节点随时会上线和下线</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>一旦节点有了完整的文件，它可以离开或者留在洪流中</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="请求文件块" class="heading-element"><span>请求文件块</span>
 <a href="#%e8%af%b7%e6%b1%82%e6%96%87%e4%bb%b6%e5%9d%97" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>在给定的时间，不同的节点拥有不同的文件块</li>
<li>一定周期，新的节点会问每个节点有哪些块</li>
<li>新节点会从其他节点处下载缺失的文件块
<strong>最稀缺优先</strong>（rarest first）：如果有10个节点都有第1、2块，只有一个节点有第3块，则先下载第3块。</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="发送文件块" class="heading-element"><span>发送文件块</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8f%91%e9%80%81%e6%96%87%e4%bb%b6%e5%9d%97" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> 发送文件块遵守<strong>一报还一报原则（tit-for-tat）</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>节点会给目前给它发送文件块速率最高的四个节点发送文件块，其他节点就不发送了，每隔 10s 会选出新的top4</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>每隔 30s 会随机选择其他节点发送文件块，这样这个随机节点可能就会成为新的top4</p>
<p>tit-for-tat原则：上传速率快的节点相应地得到高下载速率的回报。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="socket编程" class="heading-element"><span>socket编程</span>
 <a href="#socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p> 目标：建立客户机/服务器的应用中的通信运用socket</p>
<p> socket：相当于应用进程和点对点传输协议之间的一扇门</p>
<p> socket类型：对应TCP和UDP有两种socket</p>
<h3 id="udp中的socket编程" class="heading-element"><span>UDP中的socket编程</span>
 <a href="#udp%e4%b8%ad%e7%9a%84socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>UDP：客户机与服务器之间没有连接</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>发送数据前不需要握手</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>发送数据包附加IP地址+端口号</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>接收方从数据包中提取处IP地址+端口号</p>
<p> UDP提供的是一种不可靠的数据流传输，传输过程中可能会丢包，接收的时候顺序也可能被打乱。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket.png" alt="UDP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket.png?size=large 2x" data-title="UDP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="udp中的socket编程示例" class="heading-element"><span>UDP中的socket编程示例</span>
 <a href="#udp%e4%b8%ad%e7%9a%84socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b%e7%a4%ba%e4%be%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>

<p>UDP服务器代码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">UDPServer.ipynb
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">from socket import * #引入socket库
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverPort = 12000 #服务器端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverSocket = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_DGRAM) #创建服务器套接字
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverSocket.bind((&#39;&#39;, serverPort)) #给套接字绑定端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">print(&#39;The server is ready to receive.&#39;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">while True: #服务器要一直在线等待，所以给一个死循环
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> message, clientAddress = serverSocket.recvfrom(2048) #从服务器套接字中读取信息（发送的消息和客户机IP地址+端口号）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> modifiedMessage = message.decode().upper() #对消息进行处理（此处是改大写）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> serverSocket.sendto(modifiedMessage.encode(), clientAddress) #将处理后的消息发回给客户机</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>UDP客户机代码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">UDPClient.ipynb
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">from socket import * #引入socket库
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverName = gethostname() #由于没得服务器，服务器主机用本机来当
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverPort = 12000 #服务器端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_DGRAM) #创建客户机套接字
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">message = input(&#39;Input lowercase sentence:&#39;) #得到输入字符串
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket.sendto(message.encode(),(serverName, serverPort)) #发送数据到相应主机名+端口号的服务器进程
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">modifiedMessage, serverAddress = clientSocket.recvfrom(2048) #接收服务器发回的消息
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">print(modifiedMessage.decode()) #显示接收的字符串
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket.close() #关闭客户机socket</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p> 先运行UDPServer.ipynb，启动服务器运行。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_server.png" alt="UDP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_server.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_server.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_server.png?size=large 2x" data-title="UDP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p> 先运行UDPClient.ipynb，进行客户机访问。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_client.png" alt="UDP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_client.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_client.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP_socket_client.png?size=large 2x" data-title="UDP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="tcp中的socket编程" class="heading-element"><span>TCP中的socket编程</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e4%b8%ad%e7%9a%84socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>服务器的先行准备</p>
<ul>
<li>服务器必须先运行</li>
<li>服务器需要创建socket来连接客户机</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>客户机连接服务器</p>
<ul>
<li>客户机需要创建自己的socket，明确服务器进程的IP地址和端口号</li>
<li>客户机创建socket时，客户机和服务器之间需建立TCP连接</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>服务器接收客户机消息</p>
<ul>
<li>服务器需创建一个新的socket，为了服务器进程能够和客户机进行通信
<ul>
<li>要运行服务器与多个客户机进行通信</li>
<li>用源的端口号来区分不同的客户机</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p> TCP提供的是一种可靠的字节流（byte-stream）传输（pipe）。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket.png" alt="TCP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="tcp中的socket编程示例" class="heading-element"><span>TCP中的socket编程示例</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e4%b8%ad%e7%9a%84socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b%e7%a4%ba%e4%be%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>TCP服务器代码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">TCPServer.ipynb
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">from socket import * #引入socket库
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverPort = 12000 #服务器端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverSocket = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM) #创建服务器套接字（前台）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverSocket.bind((&#39;&#39;, serverPort)) #给套接字绑定端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverSocket.listen(1)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">print(&#39;The server is ready to receive.&#39;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">while True: #服务器要一直在线等待，所以给一个死循环
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> connectionSocket, addr = serverSocket.accept() #前台套接字接收到请求后，创建一个新的套接字（窗口）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> sentence = connectionSocket.recv(1024).decode() #窗口套接字读取信息
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> capitalizedSentence = sentence.upper() #对消息进行处理（此处是改大写）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> connectionSocket.send(capitalizedSentence.encode()) #将处理后的信息发回给客户机
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> connectionSocket.close() #关闭窗口套接字，前台套接字保持开放</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>TCP客户机代码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">TCPClient.ipynb
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">from socket import * #引入socket库
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverName = gethostname() #由于没得服务器，服务器主机用本机来当
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">serverPort = 12000 #服务器端口号
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM) #创建客户机套接字(类型为字节流SOCK_STREAM)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket.connect((serverName, serverPort)) #TCP连接
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">sentence = input(&#39;Input lowercase sentence:&#39;) #得到输入字符串
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket.send(sentence.encode()) #发送数据到服务器
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">modifiedSentence = clientSocket.recv(1024) #接收服务器发回的消息
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">print(&#39;From server:&#39;, modifiedSentence.decode()) #显示接收的字符串
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">clientSocket.close() #关闭客户机socket</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p> 先运行TCPServer.ipynb，启动服务器运行。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_server.png" alt="TCP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_server.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_server.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_server.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p> 先运行TCPClient.ipynb，进行客户机访问。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_client.png" alt="TCP socket.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_client.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_client.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP_socket_client.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP socket.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h1 id="传输层transport-layer" class="heading-element"><span>传输层（Transport Layer）</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%b1%82transport-layer" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h1><h2 id="传输层服务" class="heading-element"><span>传输层服务</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%b1%82%e6%9c%8d%e5%8a%a1" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="传输层概述" class="heading-element"><span>传输层概述</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%b1%82%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>为不同主机之间的应用进程提供通信的桥梁</li>
<li>端对端：传输层协议在端系统间运行，不需要涉及网络核心
<ul>
<li>发送方把应用层接到的消息分成段（segment），再把这些段传输给网络层</li>
<li>接收方把接收到的段重新拼装成消息，传输给应用层</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>传输层的协议：TCP和UDP</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>传输层和网络层对比</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>网络层：主机之间的通信</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>传输层：进程之间的通信</p>
<p>传输层依赖于并能强化网络层服务。</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="传输层协议" class="heading-element"><span>传输层协议</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bc%a0%e8%be%93%e5%b1%82%e5%8d%8f%e8%ae%ae" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>TCP：可靠的，有序的传送</p>
<ul>
<li>拥塞控制</li>
<li>流量控制</li>
<li>需要建立连接</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>UDP：不可靠的，无序的传送</p>
<ul>
<li>提供尽力而为交付服务</li>
</ul>
<p>二者均不提供的服务：延时保障、带宽保障</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="多路复用multiplexing与多路分用demultiplexing" class="heading-element"><span>多路复用（Multiplexing）与多路分用（Demultiplexing）</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%a4%8d%e7%94%a8multiplexing%e4%b8%8e%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%88%86%e7%94%a8demultiplexing" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p> 多路复用存在于发送方：发送方需要处理多个套接字，并且给套接字加上传输层的头部。</p>
<p> 多路分用存在于接收方：利用头部信息，将接收到的报文段传输给正确的套接字。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Multiplexing.png" alt="Multiplexing/demultiplexing.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Multiplexing.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Multiplexing.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Multiplexing.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Multiplexing/demultiplexing.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="多路分用" class="heading-element"><span>多路分用</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%88%86%e7%94%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="多路分用工作流程" class="heading-element"><span>多路分用工作流程</span>
 <a href="#%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%88%86%e7%94%a8%e5%b7%a5%e4%bd%9c%e6%b5%81%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>
<p>主机收到IP数据报（IP datagram）</p>
<ul>
<li>每个数据报有源IP地址和目的IP地址</li>
<li>每个数据报携带一个传输层报文段（segment）</li>
<li>每个报文段有源和目的的端口号</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>主机利用IP地址和端口号来把报文段传入正确的套接字</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_segment-format.png" alt="segment format.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_segment-format.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_segment-format.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_segment-format.png?size=large 2x" data-title="segment format.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="无连接的多路分用connectionless-demultiplexing" class="heading-element"><span>无连接的多路分用（Connectionless demultiplexing）</span>
 <a href="#%e6%97%a0%e8%bf%9e%e6%8e%a5%e7%9a%84%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%88%86%e7%94%a8connectionless-demultiplexing" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> 参考<a href="https://gy23333.github.io/2020/03/16/%e3%80%8a%e8%ae%a1%e7%ae%97%e6%9c%ba%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c-%e8%87%aa%e9%a1%b6%e5%90%91%e4%b8%8b%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e3%80%8b%e7%ac%94%e8%ae%b0/#UDP%e4%b8%ad%e7%9a%84socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">UDP的socket工作方式</a>，如果数据报的<strong>目的IP地址和端口号</strong>相同，它们将被传到同一个socket当中。（即使数据报的源可能不同）</p>
<h4 id="面向连接的多路分用connection-oriented-demux" class="heading-element"><span>面向连接的多路分用（Connection-oriented demux）</span>
 <a href="#%e9%9d%a2%e5%90%91%e8%bf%9e%e6%8e%a5%e7%9a%84%e5%a4%9a%e8%b7%af%e5%88%86%e7%94%a8connection-oriented-demux" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p> 参考<a href="https://gy23333.github.io/2020/03/16/%e3%80%8a%e8%ae%a1%e7%ae%97%e6%9c%ba%e7%bd%91%e7%bb%9c-%e8%87%aa%e9%a1%b6%e5%90%91%e4%b8%8b%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95%e3%80%8b%e7%ac%94%e8%ae%b0/#TCP%e4%b8%ad%e7%9a%84socket%e7%bc%96%e7%a8%8b"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">TCP的socket工作方式</a></p>
<ul>
<li>标记TCP的socket需要4元组：源IP地址、源端口号、目的IP地址、目的端口号</li>
<li>多路分用：接收方要用到上面4个值来传入不同的socket</li>
<li>服务器的主机可能要同时支持多个TCP连接</li>
<li>web服务器有不同的socket对应每个连接的客户机，其中非持久性HTTP会给每个请求都建立新的socket。</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="udp-1" class="heading-element"><span>UDP</span>
 <a href="#udp-1" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="udp概述" class="heading-element"><span>UDP概述</span>
 <a href="#udp%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p> UDP（User Datagram Protocol，用户数据报协议），标准为RFC 768。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>只有基本的功能</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>尽力而为的服务，UDP可能会丢包或者失序</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>不用连接：客户机和服务器不需要握手，每个UDP段都是独立处理的</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP-segment.png" alt="UDP segment.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP-segment.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP-segment.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_UDP-segment.png?size=large 2x" data-title="UDP segment.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
