<h5 id="tcp-receiver" class="heading-element"><span>TCP receiver</span>
 <a href="#tcp-receiver" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h5><table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: left">事件</th>
 <th style="text-align: left">TCP接收方反应</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">具有所期望序号的按序报文段到达。所有在期望序号及以前的数据都已经被确认</td>
 <td style="text-align: left"><strong>延迟的ACK</strong>，对另一个按序报文段的到达最多等待500ms。如果下一个按序报文段在这个时间间隔内没有到达，则发送一个ACK</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">具有所期望序号的按序报文段到达。另一个按序报文段等待ACK传输</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">立即发送单个累计ACK，以确认两个按序报文段</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">比期望序号大的失序报文段到达。检测出间隔</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">立即发送冗余ACK，指示下一个期待字节的序号（其为间隔的低端的序号）</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: left">能部分或完全填充接收数据间隔的报文段到达</td>
 <td style="text-align: left">倘若该报文段起始于间隔的低端，则立即发送ACK</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<h4 id="tcp快速重传" class="heading-element"><span>TCP快速重传</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e5%bf%ab%e9%80%9f%e9%87%8d%e4%bc%a0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>timeout时间长，造成长时延</li>
<li>通过重复的ACK检测丢包
<ul>
<li>发送方会发送很多个segment</li>
<li>如果有segment丢失，则可能会收到很多个重复的ACK</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p>TCP快速重传机制：</p>
<p> 如果发送方收到对同一数据收到3个重复的ACK（实际收到4次该ACK），则认为此时未ACK的segment丢失，不需再等待timeout，重发未ACK的最小seq#</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-fastRetransmission.png" alt="TCP fast retransmit.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-fastRetransmission.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-fastRetransmission.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-fastRetransmission.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP fast retransmit.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="流量控制" class="heading-element"><span>流量控制</span>
 <a href="#%e6%b5%81%e9%87%8f%e6%8e%a7%e5%88%b6" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p> 接收方要控制发送方，使发送方不会发送得太快导致接收方的缓存（buffer）溢出。</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>接收方告诉发送方free buffer大小，包含在TCP报文的</p>
<p>rwnd</p>
<p>（receive window中）</p>
<ul>
<li>RcvBuffer socket设定大小（一般，4096）</li>
<li>一些操作系统也可以自动调节RcvBuffer</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p>图 接收方缓存</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-receiverBuffering.png" alt="TCP receiver Buffering.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-receiverBuffering.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-receiverBuffering.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-receiverBuffering.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP receiver Buffering.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>sender通过rwnd来限制unacked segment的数量</li>
<li>保障receive的buffer不会溢出</li>
</ul>
<p> 如果sender接收到rwnd=0rwnd=0，此时没有剩余buffer，再发送数据会造成receiver buffer溢出，但是有要防止锁住。
 所以sender向receiver发送一个1 byte data的报文，以更新rwnd。</p>
<h3 id="连接管理" class="heading-element"><span>连接管理</span>
 <a href="#%e8%bf%9e%e6%8e%a5%e7%ae%a1%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><h4 id="tcp建立连接3次握手" class="heading-element"><span>TCP建立连接：3次握手</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e5%bb%ba%e7%ab%8b%e8%bf%9e%e6%8e%a53%e6%ac%a1%e6%8f%a1%e6%89%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>建立连接之前，先握手</p>
<ul>
<li>双方同意建立连接</li>
<li>同意连接的参数</li>
</ul>
<p> 为什么两次握手行不通？</p>
<ul>
<li>各种delay</li>
<li>消息丢失导致重传</li>
<li>消息乱序</li>
</ul>
<p>图 TCP3次握手 
<img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-three-way-handshake.png" alt="TCP three-way handshake.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-three-way-handshake.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-three-way-handshake.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-three-way-handshake.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP three-way handshake.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h4 id="tcp关闭连接4次挥手" class="heading-element"><span>TCP关闭连接：4次挥手</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e5%85%b3%e9%97%ad%e8%bf%9e%e6%8e%a54%e6%ac%a1%e6%8c%a5%e6%89%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><ul>
<li>client、server两边都可关闭连接
<ul>
<li>发送TCP segment的 FIN bit = 1</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>用ACK回应FIN（ACK可以和FIN一起发）</li>
<li>同时收到FIN也可以处理（双工）</li>
</ul>
<p>图 TCP关闭连接
<img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-closeConnection.png" alt="TCP closing connection.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-closeConnection.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-closeConnection.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-closeConnection.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP closing connection.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>图 TCP双方状态循环</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-Lifecycle.png" alt="TCP Lifecycle.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-Lifecycle.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-Lifecycle.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-Lifecycle.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP Lifecycle.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="拥塞控制原理" class="heading-element"><span>拥塞控制原理</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8b%a5%e5%a1%9e%e6%8e%a7%e5%88%b6%e5%8e%9f%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>拥塞：</p>
<ul>
<li>非正式定义：太多的源发送数据太多太快，导致网络无法处理</li>
<li>和流量控制不同（流量控制c-s一对一）</li>
<li>产生丢包、延时</li>
<li>网络前十的问题</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="场景一2个sender-和1个无限buffer的router" class="heading-element"><span>场景一：2个Sender, 和1个无限buffer的Router</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9c%ba%e6%99%af%e4%b8%802%e4%b8%aasender-%e5%92%8c1%e4%b8%aa%e6%97%a0%e9%99%90buffer%e7%9a%84router" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>2个sender，2个receiver</li>
<li>1个router带无限buffer</li>
<li>输出链路的容量：R</li>
<li>没有重传（无限buffer不会丢包）</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1.png" alt="Congestion scenario1.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Congestion scenario1.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>图 输入速率-输出速率</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1-out.png" alt="Congestion scenario1 out.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1-out.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1-out.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1-out.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Congestion scenario1 out.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>

<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1-delay.png" alt="Congestion scenario1 delay.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1-delay.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1-delay.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario1-delay.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Congestion scenario1 delay.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="场景二2个sender-和1个有限buffer的router" class="heading-element"><span>场景二：2个Sender, 和1个有限buffer的Router</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9c%ba%e6%99%af%e4%ba%8c2%e4%b8%aasender-%e5%92%8c1%e4%b8%aa%e6%9c%89%e9%99%90buffer%e7%9a%84router" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>一个router、有限buffer</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>重传timeout的packet</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>λinλin —— 源数据</p>
</li>
<li></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<pre><code>λ′inλin′

 

—— 源数据+重传



λ′in≥λinλin′≥λin
</code></pre>
<p>正常理想情况下，</p>
<p>λ′in≥λin=λoutλin′≥λin=λout</p>
<p>情况一（理想）：sender只在router的buffer有空时才发送</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic1.png" alt="Congestion scenario2 pic1.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic1.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic1.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic1.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Congestion scenario2 pic1.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>情况二：知道丢包，当router的buffer满了，packet丢失。sender只有在知道丢包时才重传。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic2.png" alt="Congestion scenario2 pic2.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic2.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic2.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic2.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Congestion scenario2 pic2.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>情况三：重复packet</p>
<ul>
<li>在router的buffer满时，packet可以丢包</li>
<li>提前timeout，会导致发送两个相同的packet</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic3.png" alt="Congestion scenario2 pic3.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic3.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic3.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_Congestion-scenario2-pic3.png?size=large 2x" data-title="Congestion scenario2 pic3.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="拥塞代价" class="heading-element"><span>拥塞代价</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8b%a5%e5%a1%9e%e4%bb%a3%e4%bb%b7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>排队延时</li>
<li>丢包导致重传</li>
<li>提前timeout导致非必要的重传，pkt重复，降低吞吐量</li>
<li>当一个packet被丢弃，其上游提供给这个packet的传输容量都浪费了</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="tcp拥塞控制" class="heading-element"><span>TCP拥塞控制</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e6%8b%a5%e5%a1%9e%e6%8e%a7%e5%88%b6" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="概述" class="heading-element"><span>概述</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a6%82%e8%bf%b0" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p> sender逐渐增加发送速率（window size），从而探查可用bandwidth，直到丢包</p>
<ul>
<li>加性增（additive increase）：cwnd每次每个RTT增加 1 MSS 直到检测到丢包（MSS 最大报文段长度）</li>
<li>乘性减（multiplicative decrease）：如果发生丢包，cwnd减半</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-AIMD.png" alt="TCP AIMD.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-AIMD.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-AIMD.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-AIMD.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP AIMD.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>sender传输限制</p>
<p>LastByteSent−LastByteAcked≤cwndLastByteSent−LastByteAcked≤cwnd</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>cwnd</strong>是动态的随着网络拥塞程度变化的函数</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>结合之前的rwnd，实际的窗口大小为 minrwnd,cwndminrwnd,cwnd</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-cwnd.png" alt="TCP cwnd.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-cwnd.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-cwnd.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-cwnd.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP cwnd.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p><strong>TCP发送速率（TCP sending rate）</strong></p>
<p> 发送cwnd bytes，等待1个RTT接收ACK，然后再发送后续的bytes。</p>
<p>rate≈cwndRTT bytes/secrate≈cwndRTT bytes/sec</p>
<h3 id="tcp慢启动tcp-slow-start" class="heading-element"><span>TCP慢启动（TCP slow start）</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e6%85%a2%e5%90%af%e5%8a%a8tcp-slow-start" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>连接开始时，先指数级增长发送速率，直到出现</p>
<p>丢包</p>
<ul>
<li>初始，cwnd=1 MSScwnd=1 MSS</li>
<li>每经过一个RTT，翻倍cwnd（实际上，每收到一个ACK，cwnd+1）</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-slow-start.png" alt="TCP slow start.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-slow-start.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-slow-start.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-slow-start.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP slow start.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>当出现<strong>丢包</strong>时，</p>
<ul>
<li>timeout情况
<ul>
<li>cwnd重新设为 1MSS</li>
<li>重新开始慢启动，直到到达一个threshold</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>3个重复的ACK情况（TCP RENO版本）
<ul>
<li>重复的ACK既然能收到，那么网络还是有一定的传输能力，不需要像timeout一样重开。</li>
<li>cwnd减半（乘性减）</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>TCP Tahoe版本中，timeout和3个重复的ACK都将cwnd设为 1MSS</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="从-slow-start-到-ca-的转换" class="heading-element"><span>从 slow start 到 CA 的转换</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%8e-slow-start-%e5%88%b0-ca-%e7%9a%84%e8%bd%ac%e6%8d%a2" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p> 当cwnd达到上次timeout时的1/2（即sstresh）时，从指数级增长变成线形增长。</p>
<p><strong>sstresh</strong> —— 出现丢包时，将sstresh设置为此时cwnd的1/2</p>
<p>图 TCP Tahoe/Reno下cwnd的变化图【注：中间有一次3次ACK的丢包】
<img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-congestion-window.png" alt="TCP congestion window.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-congestion-window.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-congestion-window.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-congestion-window.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP congestion window.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="tcp拥塞控制fsm" class="heading-element"><span>TCP拥塞控制FSM</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e6%8b%a5%e5%a1%9e%e6%8e%a7%e5%88%b6fsm" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-congestion-control.png" alt="TCP congestion control.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-congestion-control.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-congestion-control.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-congestion-control.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP congestion control.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="tcp吞吐量" class="heading-element"><span>TCP吞吐量</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e5%90%9e%e5%90%90%e9%87%8f" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>avg TCP throughput（TCP平均吞吐量）由window size 和 RTT 决定（忽略slow start，假设一直由data在发送）</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>W：丢包时的 window size，avg window size 为</p>
<p>3/4W3/4W</p>
<p>，则TCP平均吞吐量为</p>
<p>avg TCP throughput=34WRTT bytes/secavg TCP throughput=34WRTT bytes/sec</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-throughput.png" alt="TCP throughput.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-throughput.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-throughput.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-throughput.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP throughput.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="高速tcp" class="heading-element"><span>高速TCP</span>
 <a href="#%e9%ab%98%e9%80%9ftcp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p> 假设一条具有 1500byte 报文段和 100ms RTT 的TCP连接，用此连接以 10Gps 发送数据。此时平均拥塞窗口长度为 83.333 个报文段。TCP连接的吞吐量公式（单位 bytes/sec）：</p>
<p>TCP throughput=1.22MSSRTTL−−√TCP throughput=1.22MSSRTTL</p>
<p>10Gps的吞吐量，报文段丢失概率为 2×10−102×10−10</p>
<h3 id="tcp公平性" class="heading-element"><span>TCP公平性</span>
 <a href="#tcp%e5%85%ac%e5%b9%b3%e6%80%a7" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>目标：K条TCP连接，经过R bps的瓶颈，每条TCP连接分 R/Kbps，则公平。</p>
<p> 以两条TCP连接为例，从A出发，经过加性增、乘性减，会逐渐趋向公平线。所以TCP可以实现公平性。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-Fairness.png" alt="TCP Fairness.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-Fairness.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-Fairness.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-Fairness.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP Fairness.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="explicit-congestion-notificationecn" class="heading-element"><span>Explicit Congestion Notification（ECN）</span>
 <a href="#explicit-congestion-notificationecn" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p><strong>网络辅助的拥塞控制</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>ToS field（IP datagram头部的 2 bits）可以被网络路由标记，以显示拥塞</li>
<li>ToS field会被送到receiver的主机</li>
<li>receiver在发送给sender的ACK中嵌入ECE，来通知sender有拥塞</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-ECN.png" alt="TCP ECN.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-ECN.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-ECN.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GY23333/imgs/master/Network_TCP-ECN.png?size=large 2x" data-title="TCP ECN.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>

item.title: 日语
item.description:
<p>记录一些学习过程中遇到的语法</p>
<h1 id="动词名词化" class="heading-element"><span>动词名词化</span>
 <a href="#%e5%8a%a8%e8%af%8d%e5%90%8d%e8%af%8d%e5%8c%96" class="heading-mark">

</h1><p>日语中的动词名词化，指的是将动词转化为名词形态，以便在句子中作为主语、宾语或补语使用。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="http://kiiiire.github.io/images/1.png" alt="动词名词化1" srcset="http://kiiiire.github.io/images/1.png?size=small, http://kiiiire.github.io/images/1.png?size=medium 1.5x, http://kiiiire.github.io/images/1.png?size=large 2x" data-title="动词名词化1" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>

<p>接续词是在两个<mark>独立的句子</mark>之间使用。</p>
<p>接续助词一般位于<mark>句中</mark>，连接动词、形容词等，使得前后内容产生逻辑关系。</p>

<p>动词て形 + (も)いい：表示允许做某事，可以做某事。</p>
<p>～なくてもいい：不必要</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="http://kiiiire.github.io/images/3.3.2.png" alt="/images/3.3.2.png" srcset="http://kiiiire.github.io/images/3.3.2.png?size=small, http://kiiiire.github.io/images/3.3.2.png?size=medium 1.5x, http://kiiiire.github.io/images/3.3.2.png?size=large 2x" data-title="/images/3.3.2.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>「ておく」</p>
<ul>
<li>「明日の会議のために資料を作っておく」理解为<mark>先</mark>，不要单纯的理解为“事先”，“预先”。</li>
<li>「窓をそのまま開けておいてください」（请让窗户这么开着就行，不用管它）</li>
<li>「てお」口语经常缩略为「と」</li>
</ul>
